bernahl.name: Knight Bernahl

steps.description: Join the [Volcano Manor](https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Volcano+Manor) family and complete two assassinations for them.
steps.description_cn: 加入火山官邸家族，为他们完成两次暗杀。

steps.description: Speak to Bernahl to recieve the [Letter to Bernahl](https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Letter+to+Bernahl).
steps.description_cn: 与贝尔纳尔对话，获得「写给贝尔纳尔的信」。

steps.description: Fight Vagram the Raging Wolf together with Bernahl after which you will receive the Raging Wolf Set.
steps.note: Vagram the Raging Wolf can be found in Leyndell after interacting with a red invasion sign.
steps.description_cn: 与贝尔纳尔一同击败「狂狼」瓦格拉姆，获得狂狼套装。
steps.note_cn: 在罗德尔与红色入侵标记互动可以找到「狂狼」瓦格拉姆。

steps.description: Defeat Rykard, Lord of Blasphemy, return to Bernahl, and exhaust his dialog.
steps.description_cn: 击败「亵渎君王」拉卡德，回到贝尔纳尔处对话至重复。

steps.description: Summon Bernahl as a cooperator against the [Godskin Duo](https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Godskin+Duo).
steps.description_cn: 在法姆·亚兹拉召唤贝尔纳尔协助对抗神皮双人组。

steps.description: Defeat Bernahl who invades you on your way to the boss arena in Farum Azula.
steps.description_cn: 在法姆·亚兹拉前往首领战途中入侵的贝尔纳尔。

failureConditions: "Defeating [Rykard
Lord of Blasphemy
bernahl.description_cn: 骄傲的骑士成为叛律者，接受火山官邸的暗杀委托。
failureConditions_cn: 在击败「亵渎君王」拉卡德之前没有完成贝尔纳尔的支线。

blaidd.name: Blaidd the Half-Wolf
blaidd.description: When wandering near the [Mistwood Ruins](https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Mistwood+Ruins) you will hear a wolf howling.

steps.description: When wandering near the [Mistwood Ruins](https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Mistwood+Ruins) you will hear a wolf howling.
steps.description_cn: 在雾林废墟附近徘徊时会听到狼的嚎叫声。

steps.description: Return to [Kalé](https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Merchant+Kal%C3%A9) at the Curch of Elleh and ask him about the howling.
steps.note: This is where you will learn the Finger Snap Gesture.
steps.description_cn: 回到艾雷教堂找咖列询问嚎叫的事。
steps.note_cn: 这是你学会弹指动作的地方。

steps.description: Return to the Mistwood Ruins and use the Finger Snap Gesture near the high tower to summon Blaidd.
steps.description_cn: 回到雾林废墟，在高塔附近使用弹指动作召唤布莱泽。

steps.description: Talk to Blaidd at the Mistwood Ruins to learn that he is looking for a man named Darriwil.
steps.description_cn: 与雾林废墟的布莱泽对话，得知他在寻找一个叫达瑞威尔的人。

steps.description: Either summon Blaidd for the fight against [Darriwil](https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Bloodhound+Knight+Darriwil) at the [Forlorn Hound Evergoal](https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Forlorn+Hound+Evergaol) or talk to him after defeating Darriwil.
steps.description_cn: 在无主猎犬封印监牢中召唤布莱泽协助对抗达瑞威尔，或击败达瑞威尔后与他对话。

steps.description: Meet Iji and let him know Blaidd sent you.
steps.note: You will now be able to buy the Carian Filigreed Crest from Iji.
steps.description_cn: 见到伊吉并告诉他布莱泽派你来的。
steps.note_cn: 现在可以从伊吉处购买卡利亚徽章。

steps.description: Meet Blaidd in Siofra River and exhaust his dialog.
steps.description_cn: 在希芙拉河见到布莱泽并对话至重复。

steps.description: Report your findings back to Blaidd in Siofra River after which he will request you participate in a festival at [Redmane Castle](https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Redmane+Castle).
steps.description_cn: 将发现告知希芙拉河的布莱泽，他会请求你参加红狮子城的祭典。

steps.description: After defeating Radahn speak with Blaidd near the Wailing Dunes site of grace.
steps.description_cn: 击败拉塔恩后，在漠北驿站附近的赐福与布莱泽对话。

blaidd.description_cn: 在雾林废墟附近徘徊时，会听到狼的嚎叫声。

boc.name: Boc the Seamster
boc.description: Just a Demi-Human looking for some love..

steps.description: Free Boc from his tree form.
steps.note: He can be found south of the [Agheel Lake North grace](https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Interactive+Map?id=10&code=mapA) and will yell out if you are close.
steps.description_cn: 把柏克从树形态解放出来。
steps.note_cn: 他可以在亚基尔湖北方赐福南边找到，靠近时会听到叫喊声。

steps.description: Talk to Boc at the [Coastal Cave](https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Coastal+Cave).
steps.description_cn: 在海岸洞窟与柏克对话。

steps.description: Defeat the boss of the Coastal Cave and return to Boc to give him his sewing tools.
steps.description_cn: 击败海岸洞窟的首领，回到柏克处给他缝衣针。

steps.description: Collect the [Gold Sewing Needle](https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Gold+Sewing+Needle) from the [Church of Vows](https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Church+of+Vows).
steps.description_cn: 从结缘教堂获取金缝衣针。

steps.description: Purchase any of the alterable boss armors from [Enia](https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Enia).
steps.description_cn: 从恩雅处购买任意可修改的首领铠甲。

steps.description: Visit Boc at any of the sites of grace mentioned in the notes of this step and give him the Gold Sewing Needle.
steps.note:
Boc can be found at any of these sites of grace:
- Lake Facing Cliffs
- East Raya Lucaria Gate
- Altus Highway Junction
- East Capital Rampart

You have now unlocked the ability to alter legendary garments.
steps.description_cn: 在步骤注明的任意赐福点找到柏克，将金缝衣针交给他。
steps.note_cn:
柏克可以在以下赐福点找到：
- 湖旁断崖
- 雷亚卢卡利亚东门
- 亚坛高速公路岔道
- 东侧王城城墙
你现在已解锁修改传说装备的能力。

steps.description: Talk to Boc and he will express his wish to be reborn.
steps.description_cn: 与柏克对话，他会表达想要重生的愿望。

boc.description_cn: 一个渴望被爱的亚人裁缝。

boggart.name: Blackguard Big Boggart
boggart.description: Boggart sells the best boiled prawn in the Lands Between!

steps.description: Talk to Rya in a pavilion north of the [Laskyar Ruins](https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Laskyar+Ruins), exhaust her dialog and promise to retrieve her necklace from the thief.
steps.description_cn: 在拉斯卡废墟以北的凉亭与菈雅对话至重复，承诺从小偷处取回项链。

steps.description: Buy Boiled Prawns from Boggart to befriend him.
steps.description_cn: 向博格特购买煮虾来与他交朋友。

steps.description: Find Boggart in the Leyndell moat and exhaust his dialog until he mentions that the [Dung Eater](https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Dung+Eater) is lurking nearby.
steps.description_cn: 在王城护城河找到博格特，对话至重复，直到他提到食粪者就附近。

steps.description: Reload the area and interact with the now wounded Boggart.
steps.note: This interaction will trigger an invasion by the Dung Eater.
steps.description_cn: 重新加载区域，与受伤的博格特互动。
steps.note_cn: 这次互动会触发食粪者的入侵。

failureConditions: "Reaching [Volcano Manor
boggart.description_cn: 博格特售卖交界地最好吃的煮虾！
failureConditions_cn: 到达火山官邸。

corhyn.name: Brother Corhyn
corhyn.description: Help Brother Corhyn find his hero; the almighty Goldmask.

image.alt: Brother Corhyn in the Roundtable Hold

steps.description: Speak with Corhyn after reaching the [Altus Plateau](https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Altus+Plateau), he will tell you he is going on a journey to find the [Goldmask](https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Goldmask).
steps.description_cn: 到达亚坛高原后与柯林对话，他会说要踏上寻找金面具的旅程。

steps.description: After resting Corhyn will be standing on the road north of the Altus Highway Junction Site of Grace.
steps.description_cn: 休息后柯林会站在亚坛高原岔路北边的路上。

steps.description: Interact with Goldmask. He will be standing on the broken bridge on the north side of Altus Plateau.
steps.description_cn: 与金面具互动，他在亚坛高原北侧的断桥上。

steps.description: Return to Corhyn and exhaust his dialog and reload the area.
steps.description_cn: 回到柯林处对话至重复，然后重新加载区域。

steps.description: Go to Corhyn, who will be standing next to Goldmask, and exhaust his dialog.
steps.description_cn: 去找站在金面具旁边的柯林，对话至重复。

steps.description: Procure the incantation [Law of Regression](https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Law+of+Regression).
steps.description_cn: 获取祷告「回归性原理」。

steps.description: Head west from [Erdtree Sanctuary grace](https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Sites+of+Grace) until you see a white message saying "Regression". Cast Law of Regression while standing on the message and facing the statue. Read the new message that appreas.
steps.description_cn: 从黄金树大教堂赐福向西走，找到写着"回归"的白色讯息，站在讯息上面朝雕像释放回归性原理，阅读出现的新讯息。

steps.description: Kill Fire Giant on the Mountain of the Giants.
steps.description_cn: 在巨人山顶击杀火焰巨人。

steps.description: Kill Beast Clergyman in Crumbling Farum Azula.
steps.description_cn: 在逐渐崩毁的法姆·亚兹拉击杀野兽祭司。

steps.description: After killing both Fire Giant and Beast Clergyman Corhyn can be found at Capital of Ash grace.
steps.description_cn: 击杀火焰巨人和野兽祭司后，柯林可在灰灭王城赐福找到。

steps.description: Find Goldmask at the bottom of the colosseum cliffs facing the west side of the Erdtree Sanctuary Site of Grace. He will give you the [Mending Rune of Perfect Order](https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Mending+Rune+of+Perfect+Order).
steps.note: Reload the area after receiving the Rune from Goldmask to be able to loot his set from his corpse.
steps.description_cn: 在斗技场悬崖底部找到金面具，面对黄金树大教堂赐福的西侧。他会给你完美律法的修复卢恩。
steps.note_cn: 从金面具处获取符文后重新加载区域，可以从他的尸体上拾取套装。

steps.description: Find Corhyn near the base of the giant spiral spear. Exhaust his dialogue.
steps.note: Reloading the area after exhausting his dialogue to be able to loot his corpse.
steps.description_cn: 在巨大的螺旋枪底部找到柯林，对话至重复。
steps.note_cn: 对话至重复后重新加载区域，可以拾取他的尸体。

failureConditions: Progressing through Crumbling Farum Azula when Corhyn has not reached Stargazers Ruins yet will fail this quest.
corhyn.description_cn: 帮助柯林寻找他的英雄——伟大的金面具。
failureConditions_cn: 在柯林尚未到达观星者废墟时推进法姆·亚兹拉会导致任务失败。

d_hunter.name: D, Hunter of the Dead
d_hunter.description: A tale of two souls and ones penchant for Weeding Deathroot.

image.alt: D, Hunter of the Dead in Limgrave

steps.description: Find D to the west of [Summonwater Village](https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Summonwater+Village) to the side of the path.
steps.note: If you defeat Godrick or the Red Wolf of Radagon before talking to D in Limgrave, he can be found at Roundtable Hold.
steps.description_cn: 在召水村以西的路边找到。
steps.note_cn: 如果在与宁姆格福的对话之前击败了葛瑞克或拉达冈的红狼，他会圆桌厅堂出现。

steps.description: Visit [Gurranq](https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Gurranq+Beast+Clergyman) at the [Bestial Sanctum](https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Bestial+Sanctum) in Caelid.
steps.description_cn: 去盖利德的野兽神殿拜访古兰格。

steps.description: After speaking to Gurranq you will be able to buy incantations from D.
steps.description_cn: 与古兰格对话后，可以从处购买祷告。

failureConditions: D dies when you reach Farum Azula
d_hunter.description_cn: 一对双胞胎与根除死根的故事。
failureConditions_cn: 到达法姆·亚兹拉时会死亡。

gideon.name: Gideon Ofnir

steps.description: Visit Roundtable Hold.
steps.description_cn: 前往圆桌厅堂。

steps.description: Obtain a Great Rune.
steps.description_cn: 获得一个大卢恩。

steps.description: Kill [Morgott the Omen King](https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Morgott+the+Omen+King).
steps.description_cn: 击杀「恶兆王」蒙葛特。

steps.description: Discover [Mohgwyn Dynasty Mausoleum](https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Mohgwyn+Dynasty+Mausoleum) and speak with Gideon.
steps.description_cn: 发现蒙格温王朝，与基甸对话。

steps.description: Kill [Mogh, Lord of Blood](https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Mohg,+Lord+of+Blood) and speak with Gideon.
steps.note: This rewards the Law of Causality incantation.
steps.description_cn: 击杀「鲜血君王」蒙格，与基甸对话。
steps.note_cn: 奖励因果性原理祷告。

steps.description: Kill [Malenia, Blade of Miquella](https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Malenia,+Blade+of+Miquella) and speak with Gideon.
steps.description_cn: 击杀「米凯拉的锋刃」玛莲妮亚，与基甸对话。

failureConditions: Killing [Maliketh
The Black Blade
failureConditions_cn: 击杀「黑剑」玛利喀斯。

irina.name: Irina
irina.description: You will find the blind and bloodied Irina after she fled a rebellion at Castle Morne. Help her deliver a letter to her father.

steps.description: Talk to Irina at the [Weeping Peninsula](https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Weeping+Peninsula) end of the [Bridge of Sacrifice](https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Bridge+of+Sacrifice).
steps.note: She will ask you to deliver a letter to her father in [Castle Morne](https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Castle+Morne) at the southern tip of the Weeping Peninsula.
steps.description_cn: 在啜泣半岛牺牲大桥的尽头与伊蕾娜对话。
steps.note_cn: 她会请求你送信给她在摩恩城的父亲。

steps.description: Return to Irina to find an [Iron Cleaver](https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Iron+Cleaver) embedded in the ground next to her.
steps.description_cn: 回到伊蕾娜处，在她身旁的地上发现一把嵌进去的铁斧。

steps.description: Defeat the [Leonine Misbegotten](https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Leonine+Misbegotten) and retrieve the [Grafted Blade Greatsword](https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Grafted+Blade+Greatsword).
steps.note: If Edgar is still alive, return to him for some dialog. After this he will return to Irina.
steps.description_cn: 击败「狮子混种」，获取「嫁接大剑」。
steps.note_cn: 如果艾德格还活着，回去与他对话。之后他会回到伊蕾娜身边。

steps.description: Return to Irina to find Edgar there with her. Talk to Edgar to progress the quest.
steps.description_cn: 回到伊蕾娜处，发现艾德格也在那里。与艾德格对话推进支线。

steps.description: Defeat the [Edgar the Revenger](https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Edgar+the+Revenger) invader.
steps.description_cn: 击败入侵NPC「复仇者艾德格」。

irina.description_cn: 你会在摩恩城叛乱后遇到失明流血的伊蕾娜。帮她送信给父亲。

latenna.name: Latenna
latenna.description: Speak to [Albus](https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Albus) and aquire the [Haligtree Secret Medallion (Right)](https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Haligtree+Secret+Medallion+(Right)).

steps.description: Speak to [Albus](https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Albus) and aquire the [Haligtree Secret Medallion (Right)](https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Haligtree+Secret+Medallion+(Right)).
steps.description_cn: 与阿尔布斯对话，获取圣树秘密符节（右）。

steps.description: Return and speak to Latenna.
steps.description_cn: 回去与勒缇娜对话。

failureConditions: Obtaining both pieces of the Haligtree Secret Medallion ([Left
latenna.description_cn: 与阿尔布斯对话，获取圣树秘密符节（右）。
failureConditions_cn: 获取圣树秘密符节的两个部分（左和右）。

alexander.name: Iron Fist Alexander
alexander.description: Alexander has set out to become a mighty warrior.. he might need some help getting there.

steps.description: Find Alexander in Northern Stormhill and help him out.
steps.note: You will have to hit him from the back in order to free him from his predicament.
steps.description_cn: 在史东薇尔城北部找到亚历山大，帮他脱困。
steps.note_cn: 你需要从背后攻击他才能帮他脱困。

steps.description: Find Alexander in Gael Tunnel.
steps.description_cn: 在盖尔坑道找到亚历山大。

steps.description: Talk to Alexander at Redmane Castle.
steps.description_cn: 在红狮子城与亚历山大对话。

steps.description: Talk to Alexander at Radahn's grace after defeating Radahn and exhaust all of his dialog.
steps.description_cn: 击败拉塔恩后，在拉塔恩的赐福处与亚历山大对话至重复。

steps.description: Find Alexander south of the Carian Study Hall and help him out.
steps.note: Throw an Oil Pot or Roped Oil Pot at him to make him "slippery".
steps.description_cn: 在卡利亚书斋南边找到亚历山大，帮他脱困。
steps.note_cn: 向他投掷油壶或绳结油壶可以让他变"滑"。

steps.description: Find Alexander bathing in the lava at Seethewater Terminus under the lavafall.
steps.description_cn: 在沸滚河终点找到泡岩浆里的亚历山大。

steps.description: Summon Alexander to help you kill the Fire Giant at Mountaintop of the Giants.
steps.description_cn: 召唤亚历山大协助击杀巨人山顶的火焰巨人。

steps.description: Fight and defeat Alexander at his request in Crumbling Farum Azula.
steps.description_cn: 在逐渐崩毁的法姆·亚兹拉应亚历山大的请求与他战斗并击败他。

failureConditions: Failing to do the first step of Alexander's quest will lock you of of completing the questline. Alexander will be locked to Radahn's arena.
alexander.description_cn: 亚历山大立志成为强大的战士……他可能需要一些帮助。
failureConditions_cn: 未能完成亚历山大第一步任务将无法完成整个支线。亚历山大将被锁在拉塔恩的竞技场。

ranni.name: Ranni the Witch
ranni.description: Help Ranni the Witch fulfill her destiny and usher in the Age of Stars. One of the longest and most intricate questlines in Elden Ring.
ranni.description_cn: 帮助魔女菈妮实现她的命运，迎来群星时代。艾尔登法环中最长且最复杂的支线之一。

steps.description: Talk to Ranni at Ranni's Rise in Liurnia after reaching Altus Plateau OR defeating Radahn. She asks you to seek out the hidden treasure of Nokron.
steps.note: Ranni's Rise requires you to have progressed Blaidd's questline partway, OR reached Altus Plateau, OR defeated Radahn.
steps.description_cn: 到达亚坛高原或击败拉塔恩后，在利耶尼亚的菈妮魔法师塔与菈妮对话。她请你寻找藏匿在诺克隆恩的秘密宝藏。
steps.note_cn: 菈妮魔法师塔需要先推进一定的支线进度，或者到达亚坛高原，也可以先击败拉塔恩。

steps.description: Speak to Blaidd, Seluvis, and Iji (advisors outside Ranni's Rise) to learn about Ranni's plan.
steps.description_cn: 与布莱泽、塞尔维斯、伊吉（菈妮魔法师塔外部）了解关于菈妮和诺克隆恩的事。

steps.description: Return to Ranni and accept service. She gives you the Carian Inverted Statue.
steps.note: This unlocks the Carian Study Hall.
steps.description_cn: 回到菈妮处接受任务，她给你卡利亚颠倒像。
steps.note_cn: 这会解锁卡利亚书斋。

steps.description: Use the Carian Inverted Statue at the Carian Study Hall to reach the Divine Tower of Liurnia. Retrieve the Cursemark of Death from the top.
steps.note: The Divine Tower is only accessible after inverting the Study Hall.
steps.description_cn: 在卡利亚书斋使用卡利亚颠倒像到达神授塔，取回猎杀指头刀。
steps.note_cn: 神圣塔是仅可到达在倒转研究大厅。

steps.description: Travel to Nokron, Eternal City (accessed via the crater after Radahn's defeat). Reach the Night's Sacred Ground and loot the Fingerslayer Blade from the chest.
steps.note: Use the Mimic Tear boss arena to find the path down to Night's Sacred Ground.
steps.description_cn: 前往诺克隆恩 (进入经由陨石坑在拉塔恩的击败) 到达黑夜神域并拾取猎杀指头刀刃从宝箱。
steps.note_cn: 使用仿身泪滴首领竞技场寻找路径向下黑夜神域。

steps.description: Return the Fingerslayer Blade to Ranni. She rewards you with the Carian Regal Scepter (if you have it) and the Dark Moon Ring. She then departs.
steps.note: Rest at the site of grace and talk to Ranni again if she doesn't reward you.
steps.description_cn: 将猎杀指头刀交给菈妮，她奖励你卡利亚权杖（法杖）并给你 inverted statue。然后她离开。
steps.note_cn: 如果她没有给你奖励，在赐福休息后再与菈妮对话。

steps.description: Speak to Seluvis (if alive) or read Seluvis's hidden notes in his secret chamber behind the bookshelf. This reveals information about Ranni's fate.
steps.note: Optional lore step.
steps.description_cn: 与瑟廉 (如果活着) 或阅读瑟廉的隐藏不在他的秘密房间后面书架. 这个揭示情报关于菈妮的命运。
steps.note_cn: 可选背景步骤。

steps.description: Find the Miniature Ranni doll at Ainsel River Main grace. Rest at grace and talk to the doll repeatedly until she responds (you may need to rest 2-3 times).
steps.note: You must exhaust the dialogue by selecting "Talk to doll" each time you rest.
steps.description_cn: 在安瑟尔河主流赐福找到细小的菈妮人偶。在赐福休息时与人偶对话至出现回应（可能需要休息2-3次）。
steps.note_cn: 必须重复对话至对话通过选择 "与人偶" 每个时间你休息。

steps.description: Proceed through Ainsel River, defeat the Dragonkin Soldier of Nokstella, and enter Lake of Rot.
steps.description_cn: 前往安瑟尔河的诺克史黛拉，击败龙人士兵，涉水穿过腐败湖。

steps.description: Cross the Lake of Rot, defeat the Goddess of Rot boss, and open the gates to the Grand Cloister.
steps.note: Use the pillar platforms to avoid Rot buildup.
steps.description_cn: 穿过腐败湖后，到达大回廊入口，通过大棺材进入。
steps.note_cn: 使用柱平台避免腐败积累。

steps.description: Navigate the Grand Cloister and find the coffin that takes you to the Astel, Naturalborn of the Void boss arena. Defeat Astel.
steps.note: Astel is a mandatory boss for Ranni's questline.
steps.description_cn: 穿过大回廊找到棺材，它会把你带到「自然之子」艾斯提的竞技场。击败艾斯提。
steps.note_cn: 艾斯缇是强制首领菈妮的支线。

steps.description: After Astel, enter the Moonlight Altar plateau. Head to the Cathedral of Manus Celes and find Ranni next to the destroyed tower. Give her the Dark Moon Ring.
steps.note: Ranni will be kneeling where Rennala once was.
steps.description_cn: 击败艾斯提后，进入月光祭坛高原，前往玛努斯·塞利斯大教堂找到菈妮的召唤标记，召唤她的暗月大剑。
steps.note_cn: 菈妮跪位置蕾娜菈一次曾是。

steps.description: Exhaust Ranni's dialogue. She gives you the Dark Moon Greatsword and thanks you. Rest at the grace and reload to find her summon sign.
steps.note: The summon sign for Ranni appears near the tower. Use it to be summoned.
steps.description_cn: 与菈妮对话至重复，她给你暗月大剑并感谢你。在赐福休息后重新加载，寻找她的召唤标记。
steps.note_cn: 召唤标记菈妮出现在附近塔. 使用召唤。

steps.description: Defeat the Glintstone Dragon Adula on the Moonlight Altar (if not already done).
steps.note: Adula guards the path. Rewards Adula's Moonblade sorcery.
steps.description_cn: 击败辉石龙亚杜拉在月光祭坛 (如果不已经)。
steps.note_cn: 亚杜拉守卫路径. 奖励亚杜拉的月光剑魔法。

failureConditions: Giving Ranni the Fingerslayer Blade before clearing Caria Manor and meeting Blaidd
Killing Blaidd prematurely
Using Seluvis's Potion on Nepheli Loux (locks Seluvis quest but not Ranni's)
failureConditions_cn: 在清理卡利亚城寨和见到布莱泽之前将猎杀指头刀交给菈妮。
提前杀死布莱泽。
将瑟濂的药水交给涅斐丽·露（不影响菈妮线，但锁瑟濂线）。

fia.name: Fia
fia.description: The Deathbed Companion seeks to create a new undead order. Help her gather the Cursemark of Death and face the champions of the Roundtable.
fia.description_cn: 死眠少女寻求创造新的不死秩序。帮她收集死亡咒痕并面对圆桌的勇士们。

steps.description: Speak to Fia in Roundtable Hold. Accept her hug to receive the Weathered Dagger (and a debuff that reduces max HP).
steps.note: The Weathered Dagger is key item. Use Baldachin's Blessing from inventory to remove the HP debuff.
steps.description_cn: 与菲雅在圆桌厅堂. 接受她的获得风化匕首 (并减益那个减少血量)。
steps.note_cn: 风化匕首是关键道具. 使用华贵恩惠从背包移除血量减益。

steps.description: Give the Weathered Dagger to D, Hunter of the Dead. Reload the area and speak to Fia again.
steps.note: D can be found in the Roundtable Hold near the blacksmith.
steps.description_cn: 交给风化匕首死亡猎人Ｄ. 重新加载区域并与菲雅再次。
steps.note_cn: 位于圆桌厅堂附近铁匠。

steps.description: After D dies (triggered by reaching Nokron), find Fia crying in her room. Exhaust her dialogue.
steps.note: D dies automatically when you enter Nokron via Radahn's crater.
steps.description_cn: D死后（到达诺克隆恩触发），发现菲雅在房间里哭泣。对话至重复。
steps.note_cn: D会在史东薇尔城地下墓地死亡，除非已经提前被击败。

steps.description: Travel to Deeproot Depths. Navigate from the Siofra Aqueduct or via the Valiant Gargoyles boss fight.
steps.note: Accessible either via the coffin after Valiant Gargoyles in Siofra, or via the sewers under Leyndell.
steps.description_cn: 前往深根底层穿过从希芙拉水道或经由英勇石像鬼首领对抗。
steps.note_cn: 可以从死王子宝座旁到达，或者从深根底层水边往下走到希芙拉河。

steps.description: Find Fia in Deeproot Depths, surrounded by her champions. Speak to her. She asks you to bring the Cursemark of Death.
steps.note: She is located near the "Across the Roots" site of grace.
steps.description_cn: 在深根底层寻找菲雅，她被自己的勇士环绕着。与她对话，她请求你带来死亡咒痕。
steps.note_cn: 她位于「穿过树根」赐福附近。

steps.description: Retrieve the Cursemark of Death from the Divine Tower of Liurnia (top floor, body of Godwyn).
steps.note: Accessible via the Carian Study Hall inversion, or separately.
steps.description_cn: 从利耶尼亚神授塔（顶楼，葛德文的尸体上）取回死亡咒痕。
steps.note_cn: 神塔在卡利亚书斋翻转后可达，也可以从神授塔底部进入。

steps.description: Return to Fia and give her the Cursemark of Death. Rest at the grace and come back.
steps.description_cn: 返回菲雅并交给她的死亡咒痕的在赐福休息并来返回。
steps.note_cn: 选择拒绝才能继续菲雅的支线。

steps.description: Defeat Fia's Champions (NPC invasion squad consisting of Lionel, Roy, etc.).
steps.note: You need to rest at grace first, then Fia's champions will invade.
steps.description_cn: 击败菲雅的英雄（NPC召唤：D的弟弟在第二场，贝纳尔等）。
steps.note_cn: 击败菲雅的英雄后获得该物品。

steps.description: Speak to Fia lying down. Receive the Baleful Shadow summon sign and complete the final step.
steps.note: Fia will ask you to hold her.
steps.description_cn: 与躺下的菲雅对话。出现恶意之影的召唤标记，击败后获得死亡咒痕。然后回到菲雅处。
steps.note_cn: 菲雅请求你厅堂她的。

steps.description: Defeat Lichdragon Fortissax (accessed by speaking to Fia while she sleeps).
steps.note: You enter Fia's dream to fight Fortissax.
steps.description_cn: 击败死龙弗尔·桑克斯 (进入通过对话菲雅同时她睡眠)。
steps.note_cn: 你进入菲雅的梦对抗弗尔·桑克斯。

steps.description: After Fortissax, respawn at the grace and loot Fia's set and the Mending Rune of the Death-Prince from her body.
steps.description_cn: 在菲雅离开的地方，从她的尸体上拾取菲雅套装和修复卢恩。

rewards: Radahn's Great Rune reward path item
failureConditions: Giving the Cursemark of Death to Fia before starting her dialogue
Killing Fia in Deeproot Depths before defeating Fortissax
Progressing to Maliketh before completing Fia's quest
failureConditions_cn: 在开始菲雅对话之前将死亡咒痕给她。
在击败死龙弗尔·桑克斯之前杀死深根底层的菲雅。
在完成菲雅支线之前推进到玛利喀斯。

dung_eater.name: Dung Eater
dung_eater.description: The Dung Eater seeks to curse the world with his Omen Seedbed curses. Help or hinder his plan to defile the Elden Ring.
dung_eater.description_cn: 食粪者试图用恶兆种子床的诅咒玷污世界。帮助或阻止他污染艾尔登法环的计划。

steps.description: Speak to Dung Eater in Roundtable Hold (he appears in the room with a table, opposite side from Fia).
steps.note: He appears after obtaining a Great Rune from a Shardbearer.
steps.description_cn: 对话食粪者在圆桌厅堂 (他出现在房间与桌子, 对面站队从菲雅)。
steps.note_cn: 他出现在获取大卢恩从碎片君王。

steps.description: Purchase the "Staunching Boluses" recipe or bring some to the Dung Eater. He asks you to bring Seedbed Curses.
steps.note: He also requires a key item to progress.
steps.description_cn: 购买 "止血药丸" 配方或带来一些食粪者. 他请求你带来温床诅咒。
steps.note_cn: 他也需要关键道具进度。

steps.description: Find the first Seedbed Curse: from the NPC invader Dung Eater in the outer moat of Leyndell (near the Capital Rampart grace).
steps.note: Defeat the invading Dung Eater to get the first curse.
steps.description_cn: 寻找第一温床诅咒: 从 NPC 入侵者食粪者在外部护城河的王城罗德尔 (附近王城城墙赐福)。
steps.note_cn: 击败入侵食粪者获得第一诅咒。

steps.description: Find the second Seedbed Curse: in the sewer gaol under Leyndell (accessed via the well in the Capital outskirts).
steps.note: In the room where you find the "Seedbed Curse" item on a body.
steps.description_cn: 寻找第二温床诅咒: 在下水道监狱下方王城罗德尔 (进入经由井王城外围)。
steps.note_cn: 在房间位置你寻找 "温床诅咒" 道具尸体。

steps.description: Find the third Seedbed Curse: in the Fortified Manor in Leyndell, first floor near a corpse.
steps.description_cn: 寻找第三温床诅咒: 在要塞官邸王城罗德尔, 第一楼层附近尸体。

steps.description: Find the fourth Seedbed Curse: on a corpse in the northeast area of the Mountaintop of the Giants, near the Guarding Guardian's Garrison.
steps.description_cn: 寻找第四温床在一具尸体上东北区域的巨人山顶, 附近守卫守护者驻屯地。

steps.description: Find the fifth Seedbed Curse: on a corpse in the Consecrated Snowfield, south of the Apostate Derelict.
steps.description_cn: 寻找第五温床在一具尸体上化圣雪原, 南的叛教废弃。

steps.description: Bring five Seedbed Curses to the Dung Eater at Roundtable Hold, or find his real body in the Subterranean Shunning-Grounds (Leyndell sewers) and use the Seedbed Curses on him directly.
steps.note: Direct interaction with his real body in the sewers unlocks his puppet summon.
steps.description_cn: 带来五温床诅咒食粪者在圆桌厅堂, 或寻找他的真实尸体弃置恶兆的地底 (王城罗德尔下水道) 并使用温床诅咒在他直接。
steps.note_cn: 直接与下水道中他的真实尸体互动，解锁他的傀儡召唤。

steps.description: Reload the area. Dung Eater will leave Roundtable Hold. Find his invasion sign near the Baleful Shadow area in the Capital of Ash.
steps.description_cn: 重新加载区域. 食粪者会离开圆桌厅堂. 寻找他的入侵标记附近灾厄幽影区域在灰灭王城。

steps.description: Defeat Dung Eater as an invader and loot the Mending Rune of the Fell Curse from his body.
steps.description_cn: 击败食粪者作为入侵者并拾取修复卢恩的恶诅咒从他的尸体。

rewards: Mending Rune of the Fell Curse
Dung Eater puppet (if using Seluvis route)
rewards_cn: 食粪者傀儡（如果走瑟濂路线）
failureConditions: Defeating Maliketh before obtaining 5 Seedbed Curses
Starting the "Seluvis's Potion" quest for Dung Eater locks alternate path
failureConditions_cn: 在收集5个种子床诅咒之前击败玛利喀斯。
对食粪者使用瑟濂的药水会锁定另一条路线。

millicent.name: Millicent
millicent.description: A young woman afflicted by the Scarlet Rot seeks a cure. Help her find her true self and confront her past.
millicent.description_cn: 一位被猩红腐败折磨的年轻女子寻求治愈。帮助她找到真正的自我，面对她的过去。

steps.description: Speak to Gowry in his shack in Caelid, south of the Smoldering Wall grace. He asks you to find a needle for Millicent.
steps.note: Gowry appears as a merchant. Exhaust all dialogue.
steps.description_cn: 在盖利德即将熄灭的城墙赐福南边的小屋找到盖里，他请你寻找米莉森。
steps.note_cn: 盖里以商人形态出现，对话至重复。

steps.description: Travel to the Church of the Plague in Caelid (just north of Sellia). Find the Unalloyed Gold Needle on the corpse near the church entrance.
steps.note: You must defeat the Cleanrot Knights outside the church.
steps.description_cn: 前往瘟疫教堂在盖利德 (就北的瑟利亚). 寻找纯净金针尸体附近教堂入口。
steps.note_cn: 必须击败清洁骑士外部教堂。

steps.description: Return to Gowry and give him the needle. He says he needs to repair it at the Ritual Site in Sellia.
steps.description_cn: 返回高瑞并交给他针. 他说他需要修复在仪式地点瑟利亚。

steps.description: Go to the Sellia Hideaway (behind a bookshelf in Sellia, unlocked by torching the three flame towers). Defeat the Nox Swordstress duo inside to access the ritual site.
steps.note: The hidden path opens after lighting all three braziers in Sellia, Town of Sorcery.
steps.description_cn: 去瑟利亚隐藏洞窟（位于瑟利亚镇，通过点燃火台解锁），在内部击败诺克斯剑客双人组，这是修复仪式的地点。
steps.note_cn: 隐藏路径打开在点燃所有三火盆瑟利亚魔法镇。

steps.description: Return to Gowry and receive the repaired Unalloyed Gold Needle.
steps.description_cn: 返回高瑞并获得修复纯净金针。

steps.description: Give the needle to Millicent (she appears north of the Erdtree Gazing Hill grace). Exhaust her dialogue.
steps.note: Millicent is on the path near the Dominula, Windmill Village area in Altus.
steps.description_cn: 交给针米莉森 (她出现在北的黄金树凝视山丘赐福). 对话至重复。
steps.note_cn: 她就在赐福北边，坐在悬崖边。

steps.description: Reload the area. Millicent moves to a new location: the Windmill Village grace near the Shaded Castle. Speak to her again.
steps.description_cn: 重新加载区域，米莉森移动到新位置：阴影城堡附近的风车村庄赐福处。再次与她对话。

steps.description: Reload again. Millicent moves to the Mountaintops of the Giants. Find her near the Ancient Snow Valley Ruins grace.
steps.description_cn: 重新加载再次. 米莉森移动到山顶进入的巨人. 寻找她的附近古雪山谷废墟赐福。

steps.description: Travel to the Haligtree. Find Millicent near the Prayer Room grace. Exhaust her dialogue.
steps.note: She is located in the inner section of Elphael.
steps.description_cn: 前往圣树，在祷告室赐福附近找到米莉森，对话至重复。
steps.note_cn: 她位于在内部区域的艾布雷菲尔。

steps.description: Choose: Help Millicent defeat her sisters (Gowry's request) OR betray Millicent and help the sisters kill her. The decision determines your reward.
steps.note: The summon signs are near the Drainage Channel grace in Elphael.
steps.description_cn: 在圣树排水通道赐福附近找到米莉森。她需要做出抉择。选择帮助她还是与她为敌。
steps.note_cn: 召唤标记是附近排水水道赐福在艾布雷菲尔。

steps.description: If you helped Millicent: defeat her sisters with her. She dies and leaves you the Rotten Winged Sword Insignia. If you betrayed her: loot Millicent's Prosthesis from her body.
steps.note: Gowry dies if you help Millicent. He leaves his bell bearing.
steps.description_cn: 如果你帮助米莉森：与她一同击败她的姐妹们。她死去后留下腐败翼剑徽章。如果你与她为敌：从她尸体上拾取米莉森的义手。
steps.note_cn: 高瑞死去如果帮助米莉森.他留下他的铃珠。

rewards: Unalloyed Gold Needle (used for Malenia's flower)
Miquella's Needle (for Frenzied Flame ending reversal, requires killing Malenia first)
rewards_cn: 纯净金针（用于玛莲妮亚的花朵）
米凯拉的针（可逆转癫火结局）
failureConditions: Killing Malenia before completing Millicent questline
Killing Gowry before giving him the Unalloyed Gold Needle
Failing to light all three braziers in Sellia before progressing too far
failureConditions_cn: 在完成米莉森支线之前杀死玛莲妮亚。
在将纯净金针交给高瑞之前杀死高瑞。
在推进太远之前未点燃瑟利亚的三个火盆。

nepheli.name: Nepheli Loux
nepheli.description: A fierce warrior and adopted daughter of Gideon Ofnir. Help her find her purpose and claim her destiny in Limgrave.
nepheli.description_cn: 基甸·奥夫尼尔的养女，一位勇猛的战士。帮助她找到自己的使命，在宁姆格福掌握自己的命运。

steps.description: Speak to Nepheli in the Roundtable Hold after entering the hold for the first time.
steps.description_cn: 与涅斐丽在圆桌厅堂进入厅堂第一时间。

steps.description: Travel to the Village of the Albinaurics in Liurnia. Find Nepheli there and speak to her.
steps.note: She is near the entrance to the village, past the wolf packs.
steps.description_cn: 前往利耶尼亚的白金村，找到涅斐丽并与她对话。
steps.note_cn: 她在村庄入口附近，穿过狼群之后。

steps.description: Defeat the Omenkiller boss at the Village of the Albinaurics. Speak to Nepheli again after the fight.
steps.description_cn: 击败恶兆杀手首领在村庄的白金. 与涅斐丽再次对抗。
steps.note_cn: 如果完成她的支线前杀了葛瑞克，她不会出现在圆桌厅堂。

steps.description: Return to Roundtable Hold. Speak to Gideon about Nepheli, then speak to Nepheli.
steps.note: Gideon is in his study.
steps.description_cn: 回到圆桌厅堂与百智爵士对话，然后寻找涅斐丽。
steps.note_cn: 基甸是在他的研究。

steps.description: Give Nepheli the Stormhawk King ashes (found on a corpse at the top of Chapel of Anticipation, accessed via the Four Belfries portal in Liurnia).
steps.note: The Stormhawk King is located on the same chapel where you start the game.
steps.description_cn: 在半狼布莱泽的尸体上找到风暴鹰古王，需要经过塞尔维斯的地下药水房（在利耶尼亚）。
steps.note_cn: 药水会永久结束她的支线，可在百智处查看。

steps.description: Travel to Kenneth Haight near the Third Church of Marika in Limgrave. Accept his quest to liberate Fort Haight.
steps.description_cn: 前往肯尼斯·海德附近玛丽卡第三教堂在宁姆格福接受他的支线解放海德要塞。

steps.description: Clear Fort Haight: defeat Godrick soldiers and the mini-boss knight. Return to Kenneth and inform him.
steps.note: The Fort is east of the Mistwood.
steps.description_cn: 清理海德要塞: 击败葛瑞克士兵并 -首领骑士返回肯尼斯并告知他。
steps.note_cn: 要塞是东的雾林。

steps.description: Speak to Gatekeeper Gostoc at Stormveil Castle. Make sure to complete his interactions (do not kill him).
steps.note: Gostoc can be found near the main gate, then throughout the castle.
steps.description_cn: 对话门卫葛托克在史东薇尔城. 确保完成他的互动 (不要击杀他)。
steps.note_cn: 确保不要杀死葛托克，否则无法完成王座室结局。

steps.description: After defeating Godrick and reloading the area, find Nepheli, Kenneth, and Gostoc together at the Stormveil throne room. Exhaust all dialogue.
steps.note: You may need to rest at the gate and back at the Secluded Cell grace.
steps.description_cn: 击败葛瑞克并重新加载区域后，在史东薇尔城王座室找到涅斐丽、肯尼斯和葛托克，对话至重复。
steps.note_cn: 可以需要休息在大门并返回隐蔽牢房赐福。

steps.description: Rest at the grace and return. Nepheli is now ruler of Stormveil. She rewards you with the Arsenal Charm and becomes a merchant.
steps.note: She sells Smithing Stones.
steps.description_cn: 在赐福休息后返回，涅斐丽成为史东薇尔的统治者，她奖励你古王护符或风暴鹰作为盟友。
steps.note_cn: 她出售锻造。

failureConditions: Killing Gostoc at Stormveil Castle
Giving Seluvis's Potion to Nepheli (locks her quest)
Killing Kenneth Haight
Progressing too far without returning to Stormveil
failureConditions_cn: 在史东薇尔城杀死葛托克。
将瑟濂的药水交给涅斐丽（锁定她的支线）。
杀死肯尼斯·海德。
推进太远未返回史东薇尔城。

patches.name: Patches
patches.description: The treacherous Patches returns. Kick him, trust him, or trick him — as always, the choice is yours.
patches.description_cn: 诡计多端的帕奇又回来了。踢他、信任他、还是骗他——一如既往，选择在你。

steps.description: Find Patches in Murkwater Cave (Limgrave, near the Murkwater Coast grace). Enter the cave and approach him.
steps.note: Patches will ambush you when you try to open the chest.
steps.description_cn: 在蒙流洞窟（宁姆格福，蒙流河岸赐福北边）找到帕奇，进入洞窟并接近他。
steps.note_cn: 帕奇会埋伏你当你打开宝箱。

steps.description: Fight Patches until he surrenders. Choose to spare him (do not deliver the finishing blow).
steps.note: If you kill him, his quest ends.
steps.description_cn: 对抗帕奇直到他投降选择饶恕他 (不要交付结束)。
steps.note_cn: 如果杀死他，该支线结束。

steps.description: Speak to Patches and exhaust his dialogue. He opens a shop and sells the "Patches' Crouch" gesture.
steps.note: Buy the gesture and important items from him.
steps.description_cn: 与帕奇对话至重复，他开店并出售「帕奇的蹲姿」动作。
steps.note_cn: 购买动作并重要道具从他。

steps.description: Return to Murkwater Cave after some progress (or rest and reload). Patches may have moved.
steps.description_cn: 回到雾水洞窟在一些进度 (或休息并重新加载) 帕奇可能有移动到。

steps.description: Find Patches at the Shaded Castle in Altus Plateau. He is disguised as a merchant. Exhaust his dialogue.
steps.note: He is in the courtyard of Shaded Castle, near the poison swamp.
steps.description_cn: 在亚坛高原的阴影城堡找到帕奇，他伪装成商人。对话至重复。
steps.note_cn: 在庭院对面，阴影城堡区域。

steps.description: Find Patches at the Mountaintops of the Giants, near the Guardian's Garrison grace.
steps.note: He is on a cliff-edge, pretending to be a merchant.
steps.description_cn: 在守护者驻屯地赐福找到巨人山顶。
steps.note_cn: 再次回到蒙流洞窟，他已离开。

steps.description: Return to Murkwater Cave one final time. Patches has left behind the "Patches Set" and "Spear +7" as his legacy. He has gone on a journey.
steps.note: This is the end of his quest. Loot his equipment from the cave.
steps.description_cn: 最后一次回到蒙流洞窟，帕奇留下了「帕奇套装」和「矛+7」作为遗产。他继续踏上旅程。
steps.note_cn: 这是他的支线终点。从洞窟拾取他的装备。

failureConditions: Killing Patches in Murkwater Cave
Killing Patches at Shaded Castle
failureConditions_cn: 在雾水洞窟杀死帕奇。
在阴影城堡杀死帕奇。

varre.name: White-faced Varré
varre.description: A servant of the Lord of Blood who tests Tarnished for worthiness. Accept his invitation to join the Bloody Fingers and gain passage to Mohgwyn Palace.
varre.description_cn: 鲜血君王的仆人，测试褪色者的资格。接受他的邀请加入血指，获得通往蒙格温王朝的道路。

steps.description: Speak to Varré at the First Step grace in Limgrave. Exhaust his dialogue.
steps.note: He is the first NPC you encounter after the tutorial.
steps.description_cn: 在宁姆格福的「引导之初」赐福遇见梵雷，对话至重复。
steps.note_cn: 他第一 NPC 你遇到在教程。

steps.description: Travel to the Roundtable Hold for the first time (after resting at the Gatefront grace or gaining a level). Return to speak to Varré again.
steps.note: He comments on the Hold.
steps.description_cn: 第一次前往圆桌厅堂（在关卡前赐福休息后），再次与梵雷对话。
steps.note_cn: 他评论在厅堂。

steps.description: Exhaust Varré's dialogue again. He gives you a "Lord of Blood's Favor" and asks you to soak it in the blood of a Maiden.
steps.description_cn: 再次与梵雷对话至重复，他给你「鲜血君王的恩宠」并要求你让女巫沾染鲜血。
steps.note_cn: 「沾染女巫」是指入侵一个女巫，或在白面具支线对话中推进。

steps.description: Use the Festering Bloody Finger (given by Varré) to invade three other worlds successfully, OR find the dead Maiden at the Church of Inhibition in Liurnia to soak the Favor.
steps.note: The Church of Inhibition is west of the Bellum Highway in Liurnia.
steps.description_cn: 使用血指（通过入侵其他玩家）多次成功入侵，或找到女巫的尸体在利耶尼亚北边的镇静教堂前。
steps.note_cn: 镇静教堂是西的彼鲁姆大道在利耶尼亚。

steps.description: Return to Varré. He rewards you with the "Bloody Finger" (infinite use invasion item) and a cloth to wipe the blood.
steps.description_cn: 回到梵雷处，他奖励你「血指」（无限使用的入侵道具）和纯血骑士勋章。
steps.note_cn: 纯血骑士勋章是传送到蒙格温王朝的关键道具。

steps.description: Varré gives you the "Pureblood Knight's Medal". Use it from your inventory to teleport to Mohgwyn Palace.
steps.note: This is a key teleport item. Do NOT discard it.
steps.description_cn: 梵雷给你「纯血骑士勋章」，从背包中使用直接传送至蒙格温王朝庙。
steps.note_cn: 这是一个关键传送道具，不要丢弃。

steps.description: Speak to Varré in Mohgwyn Dynasty Mausoleum (near the Dynasty Mausoleum grace). Exhaust his dialogue.
steps.description_cn: 与梵雷 在蒙格温王朝王朝灵庙 (附近王朝灵庙赐福). 对话至重复。
steps.note_cn: 和NPC互动后对话至重复。

steps.description: Defeat Mohg, Lord of Blood. Return to Varré's location (he may have moved).
steps.description_cn: 击败「鲜血君王」蒙格，回到梵雷的位置（他可能移动过）。

steps.description: If you defeat Mohg before finishing the quest, you can still complete steps by visiting Varré at the Mohgwyn Palace grace.
steps.note: Varré becomes hostile if you kill Mohg before getting his medal.
steps.description_cn: 在击败蒙格之前推进支线，他仍然可用，可在蒙格温王朝的赐福与他对话。
steps.note_cn: 梵雷 成为敌对如果击杀蒙格之前获得他的徽章。

steps.description: Kill or spare Varré at the end of the questline. He drops the War Surgeon Set and his Bell Bearing if killed.
steps.note: Optional: you can keep him alive as a merchant.
steps.description_cn: 在支线结束时选择杀死或放过梵雷，他会掉落战外科医师套装（如果杀死）。
steps.note_cn: 如果你杀了他，他就不再提供任何服务。

rewards: Lord of Blood's Exultation (talisman) from Mohg fight
rewards_cn: 纯血骑士勋章（传送至蒙格温王朝）
战外科医生套装（如果杀死）
failureConditions: Killing Varré before obtaining the Pureblood Knight's Medal
Killing Mohg before receiving the medal (locks teleport option)
failureConditions_cn: 在获得纯血骑士勋章之前杀死梵雷。
在获得勋章之前杀死蒙格。

thops.name: Thops
thops.description: A simple sorcery scholar at the Church of Irith. He seeks a way to pass through the seal of the Academy of Raya Lucaria.
thops.description_cn: 伊利斯教堂的普通魔法学者。他寻求穿越雷亚卢卡利亚学院封印的方法。

steps.description: Speak to Thops at the Church of Irith in Liurnia. Exhaust his dialogue about the Academy seal.
steps.note: He is south of the Lake-Facing Cliffs grace.
steps.description_cn: 与托普斯在伊利斯教堂利耶尼亚. 对话至重复关于学院。
steps.note_cn: 他南的湖畔断崖赐福。

steps.description: Learn the "Thops' Barrier" sorcery from him. You can buy it for 1000 runes.
steps.description_cn: 了解 "托普斯的屏障" 魔法从他. 可以购买 1000 卢恩。

steps.description: Find the Academy Glintstone Key in Liurnia (one is west of the Raya Lucaria gate on a corpse guarded by a giant ball).
steps.description_cn: 寻找学院辉石钥匙在利耶尼亚 (是西的雷亚卢卡利亚大门一具尸体上守卫通过巨人)。

steps.description: Enter the Academy of Raya Lucaria through the main gate. Unlock the seal.
steps.description_cn: 进入雷亚卢卡利亚学院穿过主要大门. 解锁。

steps.description: Return to Thops and tell him you entered the Academy. He gives you a "Glintstone Key" and asks you to deliver something.
steps.description_cn: 回到托普斯处，告诉他你进入了学院，他给你「辉石钥匙」托你交给某人。
steps.note_cn: 这把钥匙是用来打开学院封印的辉石钥匙。

steps.description: Progress through the Academy. After defeating Red Wolf of Radagon, find the "Academy Glintstone Key" in the debate hall.
steps.description_cn: 推进学院进度，击败拉达冈的红狼后，找到「学院辉石钥匙」从一间教室。

steps.description: Visit the classroom in the Academy (past the Debate Parlor). Find the "Thops's Key" item on a corpse.
steps.description_cn: 访问教室在学院 (过去讨论室). 寻找 "托普斯的钥匙" 道具一具尸体上。

steps.description: Continue to the church where the school classroom is. On a corpse near the sealed door, find Thops's Bell Bearing and his set.
steps.note: Thops dies here. His body is found at the church.
steps.description_cn: 在正门的尸体上找到教室钥匙后，如果之前错过，回到教室，找到托普斯的尸体并拾取他的装备。
steps.note_cn: 托普斯已去世，他的尸体在教堂被发现。

steps.description: Return to the Church of Irith to find Thops's hat and the "Thops' Barrier" upgrade path.
steps.note: The hat is behind where Thops originally stood.
steps.description_cn: 返回伊利斯教堂找到托普斯的并 "托普斯的屏障" 强化路径。
steps.note_cn: 是后面位置托普斯最初站。

failureConditions: Killing Thops early
Never returning after entering the Academy
failureConditions_cn: 提前杀死托普斯。
进入学院后未返回。

rogier.name: Sorcerer Rogier
rogier.description: A veteran sorcerer scarred by his encounter with Deathroot. Help him unravel the mystery of the Black Knife plot.
rogier.description_cn: 一位饱经风霜的魔法师，因遭遇死根而伤痕累累。帮助他揭开黑刀阴谋之谜。

steps.description: Find Rogier at Stormveil Castle, on a balcony near the Rampart Tower grace. Exhaust his dialogue.
steps.note: He is before the area where you fight the Banished Knight.
steps.description_cn: 在史东薇尔城的城墙赐福旁边找到罗杰尔，在阳台处对话至重复。
steps.note_cn: 他之前区域位置你对抗放逐骑士。

steps.description: Defeat Godrick the Grafted. Rogier moves to Roundtable Hold.
steps.note: He appears in the Roundtable Hold near the fireplace.
steps.description_cn: 击败葛瑞克接肢. 罗杰尔移动到圆桌厅堂。
steps.note_cn: 他出现在圆桌厅堂附近壁炉。

steps.description: Speak to Rogier in Roundtable Hold. He asks you to find the Black Knife Print and the Cursemark of Death.
steps.description_cn: 与圆桌厅堂的罗杰尔对话，他请你寻找黑刀烙印并带回夜与火之城。

steps.description: Travel to Nokron, Eternal City. In the Night's Sacred Ground area, find the Black Knife Print on a corpse near a false Night Maiden.
steps.note: It's on a body near the gargoyle that shoots projectiles.
steps.description_cn: 前往诺克隆恩的黑夜神域，在一个尸体上找到黑刀烙印（位于黑刀刺客附近）。
steps.note_cn: ' 在尸体附近石像鬼那个射击弹射物。

steps.description: Return the Black Knife Print to Rogier. He examines it and tells you about Ranni's involvement with the Night of Black Knives.
steps.description_cn: 返回黑匕首印记罗杰尔. 他检查并告诉你关于菈妮的参与使用黑夜的黑匕首。

steps.description: Speak to Rogier again after resting. He directs you to Ranni's Rise.
steps.description_cn: 与罗杰尔再次在休息. 他直接你菈妮魔法师塔。

steps.description: Progress Ranni's questline. When Ranni departs (after giving her the Fingerslayer Blade), return to Rogier.
steps.note: Rogier is dying.
steps.description_cn: 推进菈妮的支线，当菈妮离开后（交付猎杀指头刀后），回到罗杰尔处。
steps.note_cn: 罗杰尔是濒死。

steps.description: Exhaust Rogier's dialogue. He gives you his Rapier +8 before passing away. Find his set and Bell Bearing on his body.
steps.note: Loot his armor set from where he sat.
steps.description_cn: 重复对话至罗杰尔的对话. 他会给你他的细剑 +8 之前关口。寻找他的套装并铃珠在他的尸体。
steps.note_cn: 拾取他的套装套装从位置他。

failureConditions: Killing Rogier at Stormveil
Killing Ranni before showing the Black Knife Print to Rogier (locks his dialogue)
failureConditions_cn: 在史东薇尔城杀死罗杰尔。
在将黑刀烙印给罗杰尔之前杀死菈妮。

hyetta.name: Hyetta
hyetta.description: A blind woman guided by the Frenzied Flame. Help her gather the Shabriri Grapes and become the maiden of the Three Fingers.
hyetta.description_cn: 一位被癫火引导的盲女。帮助她收集夏玻利利葡萄，成为三指的巫女。

steps.description: Meet Hyetta at the Lake-Facing Cliffs grace in Liurnia. She asks for a Shabriri Grape.
steps.note: She appears after you've met Yura near Murkwater and progressed his questline, or after you've inherited the Frenzied Flame.
steps.description_cn: 遇见海妲在湖畔断崖赐福利耶尼亚. 他请求夏玻利利葡萄。
steps.note_cn: 夏玻利利的葡萄关联到海妲和海妲的支线，最终引导你继承癫火。

steps.description: Obtain the Shabriri Grape from the body of the NPC invader at the Gate Town Bridge (north of the Lake-Facing Cliffs). OR loot from Yura's body after he dies.
steps.note: The invader drops the first grape.
steps.description_cn: 获取夏玻利利葡萄从尸体的 NPC 入侵者在大门镇大桥 (北的湖畔断崖). 或拾取从尤拉的尸体他死去。
steps.note_cn: 入侵者掉落第一葡萄。

steps.description: Give the Shabriri Grape to Hyetta. Reload the area. She moves to a new spot near the Purified Ruins in Liurnia.
steps.description_cn: 交给夏玻利利葡萄海妲. 重新加载区域. 她移动到新附近净化废墟在利耶尼亚。

steps.description: Find a second Shabriri Grape at the Purified Ruins (chest underground). Give it to Hyetta.
steps.note: The chest is through the illusory floor in the ruins.
steps.description_cn: 寻找第二夏玻利利葡萄在净化废墟 (宝箱地下). 交给海妲。
steps.note_cn: 宝箱是穿过幻影楼层在废墟。

steps.description: Reload. Hyetta moves to the Bellum Church in northern Liurnia. Speak to her.
steps.note: She is near the Church of Vows.
steps.description_cn: 重新加载，海妲移动到利耶尼亚北部的彼鲁姆教堂。与她对话。
steps.note_cn: 他附近教堂的誓言。

steps.description: Find the third Shabriri Grape on the body of Edgar the Revenger (the invader who appears after Irina questline). Give it to Hyetta.
steps.note: Edgar invades near the Revenger's Shack after his daughter's death.
steps.description_cn: 寻找第三夏玻利利葡萄在尸体的艾德格复仇 (入侵者出现在伊蕾娜支线). 交给海妲。
steps.note_cn: 艾德格入侵附近复仇小屋在他的女儿死亡。

steps.description: Reload. Hyetta moves to the Gate of the Frenzied Flame (at the bottom of the Subterranean Shunning-Grounds in Leyndell sewers).
steps.note: This is after the Cathedral of the Forsaken.
steps.description_cn: 重新加载. 海妲移动到大门的癫火火焰 (在底部的弃置恶兆的地底王城罗德尔下水道)。
steps.note_cn: 这是在被遗弃的大教堂。

steps.description: Remove all armor and approach the door to the Three Fingers to inherit the Frenzied Flame. Hyetta guides you.
steps.note: You must be naked to enter the door.
steps.description_cn: 移除所有套装并接近门三指继承癫火火焰. 海妲引导你。
steps.note_cn: 必须赤裸进入门。

steps.description: After inheriting the Frenzied Flame, speak to Hyetta. She reveals her true nature and becomes the maiden of the Frenzied Flame.
steps.note: This locks you into the Frenzied Flame ending unless you use Miquella's Needle.
steps.description_cn: 继承癫火后，与海妲对话。她揭示自己的真实身份是女巫的指头少女。
steps.note_cn: 这个锁住你在癫火火焰结局除非你使用米凯拉的针。

rewards: Inheriting the Frenzied Flame (required for Frenzied Flame ending)
rewards_cn: 继承癫火（癫火结局必要条件）
failureConditions: Killing Hyetta or failing to give her grapes as she moves
Defeating the Fire Giant before completing the Frenzied Flame quest locks you out of inheriting it
failureConditions_cn: 杀死海妲或未能在她移动时给她葡萄。
在完成癫火任务之前击败火焰巨人会导致无法继承癫火。

sellen.name: Sorceress Sellen
sellen.description: A formidable sorceress exiled from Raya Lucaria. Help her reclaim her rightful place as the leader of the Academy, or betray her to her rival.
sellen.description_cn: 一位被雷亚卢卡利亚驱逐的强大魔法师。帮助她夺回学院领导者的地位，或者背叛她给她的对手。

steps.description: Find Sellen in Limgrave, in a ruined building just north of the Waypoint Ruins cellar. Speak to her and learn sorceries.
steps.note: She is east of Agheel Lake.
steps.description_cn: 在宁姆格福，驿站街遗迹以北的废墟建筑地下室找到瑟濂，与她对话了解魔法。
steps.note_cn: 她在这个地下室的魔法师囚笼后面，对话前先旋转视角。

steps.description: Travel to the Witchbane Ruins in Weeping Peninsula (southwest Limgrave). Find Sellen's real body imprisoned in the cellar.
steps.note: This is needed later for the quest.
steps.description_cn: 前往啜泣半岛的寻妖废墟（宁姆格福西南），在那里找到瑟濂的真实尸体。
steps.note_cn: 这是需要之后支线。

steps.description: Travel to Sellia, Town of Sorcery in Caelid. Find the hidden cellar with Sellen's primal glintstone.
steps.note: Behind an illusory floor in Sellia.
steps.description_cn: 前往瑟利亚魔法镇在盖利德寻找隐藏地下室与瑟濂的原始辉石。
steps.note_cn: 后面幻影楼层在瑟利亚。

steps.description: Return to Sellen in Limgrave and tell her about the primal glintstone. She asks you to bring it to her.
steps.description_cn: 回到宁姆格福的瑟濂处，告诉她关于原始辉石的事。她请你帮她找到它。

steps.description: Go to the hidden cellar in Sellia and retrieve Sellen's primal glintstone. Give it to her.
steps.description_cn: 前往瑟利亚的隐藏地下室，取回瑟濂的原始辉石，交给她。
steps.note_cn: 隐藏地下室在瑟利亚镇的一个书架后面。

steps.description: Sellen tells you about her rival, Jerren. She needs you to help her reclaim the Academy. Choose to side with Sellen or Jerren.
steps.note: This is the branching point.
steps.description_cn: 瑟濂告诉你关于她的对手杰廉的事，她需要你帮她夺回学院。选择站在瑟濂或杰廉一方。
steps.note_cn: 与杰廉对话前，建议先探索拉塔恩的祭典。

steps.description: If siding with Sellen: travel to Redmane Castle in Caelid and speak to Jerren. Trigger the Radahn festival if not already done.
steps.note: After Radahn, Jerren moves.
steps.description_cn: 如果站在瑟濂一方：前往盖利德的红狮子城与杰廉对话，触发拉塔恩祭典。
steps.note_cn: 在红狮子城与杰廉对话前，建议先完成拉塔恩祭典。

steps.description: Find Jerren at the Witchbane Ruins in Weeping Peninsula (he is hunting Sellen). Kill Jerren.
steps.note: This completes the task for Sellen.
steps.description_cn: 在啜泣半岛 (他猎杀瑟濂)找到杰廉寻罪者废墟。击杀杰廉。
steps.note_cn: 你需要找到塞露薇的药师秘密笔记后才能得知真相。

steps.description: Travel to the Grand Library of Raya Lucaria (after defeating Rennala). Sellen's soul is now in a new body. Speak to her.
steps.note: She is at Rennala's location.
steps.description_cn: 前往雷亚卢卡利亚大书库（击败蕾娜菈后），瑟濂的灵魂已附在新躯体上。与她对话。
steps.note_cn: 他在蕾娜菈的位置。

steps.description: If siding with Jerren: defeat Sellen at the Witchbane Ruins. She drops the Sorceress Set and Glintstone Kris. Jerren rewards you.
steps.note: Alternate ending.
steps.description_cn: 如果站在杰廉一方：在寻妖废墟击败瑟濂，她掉落魔女套装和瑟濂的辉石。
steps.note_cn: 替代结局。

steps.description: After siding with Sellen, she becomes the new leader of Raya Lucaria. You can buy all her sorceries. Eventually, she transforms into a Graven Witch (ball of faces).
steps.note: The transformation happens after reloading. Loot her set from her body.
steps.description_cn: 如果站在瑟濂一方，她成为雷亚卢卡利亚的新领导者，你可以向她购买强力魔法。然而，她最终会变成创魔女（球状）。
steps.note_cn: 重新加载后会触发转化，从她的身体上拾取套装。

rewards: Access to all Sellen sorceries shop
Jerren's armor set (if siding with Jerren)
rewards_cn: 瑟濂所有魔法的购买权
杰廉的套装（如果选择杰廉线）
failureConditions: Killing Sellen before completing her quest
Killing Jerren before speaking to him at Redmane Castle
Progressing too far past Maliketh without completing the quest
failureConditions_cn: 在完成其支线之前杀死瑟濂。
在红狮子城与杰廉对话之前杀死他。
推进至玛利喀斯之后未完成此支线。

yura.name: Bloody Finger Hunter Yura
yura.description: A hunter of Bloody Finger invaders along the Murkwater River. Help him hunt, or claim his gear after his inevitable demise.
yura.description_cn: 沿着雾水河猎杀血指入侵者的猎人。帮助他猎杀，或在他不可避免的死亡后获取他的装备。

steps.description: Find Yura under the ruins near Murkwater Coast (Limgrave). He warns you about Nerijus.
steps.note: He is under the broken bridge near the Murkwater Cave entrance.
steps.description_cn: 在蒙流海岸附近的废墟下找到尤拉，他警告你关于涅利乌斯的事。
steps.note_cn: 他下方破损大桥附近雾水洞窟入口。

steps.description: When Nerijus invades near Murkwater Cave, Yura appears as a summon sign. Summon him to help defeat Nerijus.
steps.note: If you defeat Nerijus alone, Yura still acknowledges you.
steps.description_cn: 涅利乌斯在蒙流洞窟附近入侵时，尤拉作为可召唤标记出现，召唤他协助击败涅利乌斯。
steps.note_cn: 涅利乌斯入侵时召唤尤拉，他会自然协助你。

steps.description: Speak to Yura again under the bridge. He gives you the "Raptor of the Mists" Ash of War.
steps.description_cn: 与尤拉再次下方大桥. 他会给你 "猛禽的雾" 战灰。

steps.description: Travel to the Main Academy Gate grace in Liurnia. Yura (invading as Eleonora in disguise?) — Actually, find Yura near the Artist's Shack in western Liurnia.
steps.note: He is on a hill near the lake.
steps.description_cn: 前往利耶尼亚的「学院正门口」赐福，尤拉早已不在了。实际上，在利耶尼亚北部找到艾琉诺拉。
steps.note_cn: 他在附近湖。

steps.description: Find Yura at the Second Church of Marika in Altus Plateau. He is wounded.
steps.description_cn: 在亚坛高原的玛莉卡第二教堂找到尤拉，他受了伤。

steps.description: After reloading, Yura has disappeared. His Nagakiba is on the ground nearby. Shabriri appears in his place.
steps.note: Speak to Shabriri's eye to get the Frenzied Flame info.
steps.description_cn: 重新加载后，尤拉已消失，他的长牙掉在地上。夏玻利利出现在他的位置。
steps.note_cn: 与夏玻利利的眼获得癫火火焰信息。

steps.description: Either pick up the Nagakiba (Yura's katana) and leave, OR speak to Shabriri. Shabriri asks you to inherit the Frenzied Flame.
steps.note: Shabriri is Yura's body possessed by the Frenzied Flame.
steps.description_cn: 捡起长牙（尤拉的太刀）后离开，或与夏玻利利对话。夏玻利利占据了他的身体。
steps.note_cn: 夏玻利利是尤拉的尸体附身通过癫火火焰。

steps.description: Find the Eleonora invasion at the Second Church of Marika (she appears as a red sign). Defeat her. You cannot summon Yura.
steps.note: Eleonora drops Eleonora's Poleblade.
steps.description_cn: 在玛莉卡第二教堂找到艾琉诺拉的入侵（红色标记），击败她。你也可以召唤尤拉协助。
steps.note_cn: 艾琉诺拉掉落艾琉诺拉的双头薙刀。

rewards: Raptor of the Mists (Ash of War)
failureConditions: Killing Yura before his questline progresses
Killing Shabriri without exhausting dialogue
failureConditions_cn: 在尤拉支线推进之前杀死他。
未对话至重复就杀死夏玻利利。

jar_bairn.name: Jar-Bairn
jar_bairn.description: A small jar warrior in the peaceful village of Jarburg. Help him train to become a mighty warrior like Alexander.
jar_bairn.description_cn: 壶村中的一个幼小壶战士。帮助他训练成为像亚历山大一样的强大战士。

steps.description: Find Jarburg in Liurnia (in the misty ravine near the Liurnia Lake Shore grace). Exhaust dialogue with all jars.
steps.note: Jarburg is in the northeastern part of Liurnia, on a cliff overlooking the lake.
steps.description_cn: 在利耶尼亚 (雾峡谷附近利耶尼亚湖岸赐福)找到壶村。重复对话至对话与所有。
steps.note_cn: 他会在利耶尼亚西部的某个位置出现，注意不要错过。

steps.description: Speak to Jar-Bairn repeatedly and exhaust all dialogue. He talks about wanting to be like Alexander.
steps.description_cn: 与小壶反复对话至重复，他谈及想去火山官邸。

steps.description: Progress Alexander's questline. Each time you help Alexander, return to tell Jar-Bairn the story.
steps.note: Return after step 3 (Redmane Castle) and step 6 (Seethewater).
steps.description_cn: 推进亚历山大支线。每次帮助亚历山大后，回去把小壶的事告诉他。
steps.note_cn: 返回在步骤 3 (红狮子城) 并步骤 6 (沸滚河)。

steps.description: After Alexander's death in Farum Azula, return to Jarburg. Reload the area.
steps.note: Jarburg is being attacked.
steps.description_cn: 亚历山大在法姆·亚兹拉去世后，回到壶村。重新加载区域。
steps.note_cn: 壶村是攻击。

steps.description: Defeat the invading jars (hostile jar enemies). Protect the village.
steps.note: Only the larger jars attack.
steps.description_cn: 击败入侵的壶敌人，保护村庄。
steps.note_cn: 仅更大攻击。

steps.description: Speak to Jar-Bairn. He is sad but determined. He gives you the companion jar talisman.
steps.description_cn: 与小壶对话，他悲伤但坚定，给你伙伴壶护符。

steps.description: Reload the area. Loot the Diallos's Set from where Diallos died (near the fountain).
steps.note: Diallos dies defending Jarburg.
steps.description_cn: 重新加载区域，在狄亚罗斯死去的地方（喷泉附近）拾取狄亚罗斯套装。
steps.note_cn: 迪亚罗斯死去防御壶村。

rewards: Companion Jar (talisman, boosts pot throwing damage)
rewards_cn: 友好壶（护符，提升壶投掷伤害）
failureConditions: Killing Alexander early (locks Jar-Bairn progress)
Failing to return to Jarburg after Alexander's death
Killing the jars in Jarburg accidentally
failureConditions_cn: 提前杀死亚历山大（锁定小壶进度）。
亚历山大死后未返回壶村。
误伤壶村的壶。

diallos.name: Knight Diallos
diallos.description: A nobleman seeking purpose. From the Roundtable to Volcano Manor to Jarburg, his journey is one of finding honor.
diallos.description_cn: 一位寻求目标的贵族。从圆桌厅堂到火山官邸再到壶村，他的旅程是寻找荣誉的旅程。

steps.description: Speak to Diallos in Roundtable Hold. He talks about his search for his lost servant Lanya.
steps.description_cn: 在圆桌厅堂遇见狄亚罗斯，他自我介绍。

steps.description: Return after progressing. He mentions he's going to Liurnia to search.
steps.description_cn: 在圆桌厅堂与狄亚罗斯对话，他提到火山官邸。

steps.description: Find Diallos at the Academy Gate Town in Liurnia, sitting near the path. Exhaust dialogue.
steps.description_cn: 前往壶村，发现狄亚罗斯在那里保护小壶们。与他对话。

steps.description: Join Volcano Manor. Talk to Diallos there (he is a fellow recusant).
steps.note: Diallos joins the Manor voluntarily.
steps.description_cn: 推进亚历山大支线，狄亚罗斯的对话会变化。
steps.note_cn: 迪亚罗斯加入官邸自愿。

steps.description: Complete the first Volcano Manor assassination (kill Old Knight Istvan). Diallos is impressed.
steps.description_cn: 击败入侵的壶敌人后，狄亚罗斯已牺牲。从他的尸体旁拾取狄亚罗斯套装。

steps.description: Speak to Diallos at the Manor. He leaves, saying he has found his purpose.
steps.description_cn: 在火山官邸遇见狄亚罗斯，他离开了，说他找到了自己的目的。

steps.description: Travel to Jarburg in Liurnia. Find Diallos there, living peacefully with the jars.
steps.description_cn: 前往利耶尼亚地下，找到狄亚罗斯并给火山官邸的信。

steps.description: After Alexander's death, return to Jarburg. Diallos dies defending the jar village from attack.
steps.description_cn: 完成火山官邸任务后，回到壶村，狄亚罗斯已死去，在壶村守卫。

steps.description: Loot Diallos's Set from his body at the Jarburg fountain.
steps.description_cn: 拾取迪亚罗斯的套装从他的尸体在壶村喷泉。

rewards_cn: 迪亚罗斯的面具（特殊效果头盔）
failureConditions: Killing Diallos before he reaches Jarburg
Failing to join Volcano Manor before advancing too far
failureConditions_cn: 在迪亚罗斯到达壶村之前杀死他。
推进太远而未加入火山官邸。

gurranq.name: Gurranq, Beast Clergyman
gurranq.description: The Beast Clergyman of the Bestial Sanctum hungers for Deathroot. Feed him to uncover his true nature.
gurranq.description_cn: 野兽神殿的野兽祭司渴求死根。喂养他以揭开他的真实本性。

steps.description: Find the Bestial Sanctum in Dragonbarrow, Caelid (northeast corner). Speak to Gurranq.
steps.note: Take the teleporter behind the Third Church of Marika, or ride through Caelid.
steps.description_cn: 在盖利德的龙墓（东北角）找到野兽神殿，与古兰格对话。
steps.note_cn: 要到达野兽神殿，要么从龙墓的传送陷阱过去，要么穿越盖利德峡谷。

steps.description: Gurranq tells you he can smell Deathroot on you. Offer him a Deathroot. He gives you Beast Eye and Claw incantations.
steps.description_cn: 古兰格说他能闻到你身上死亡根的气息。提交一个死亡根，他会给你野兽爪击作为奖励。

steps.description: Offer Deathroot #1: reward — Claw (beast claw incantation) and Beast Eye key item.
steps.description_cn: 提交死根 #1: 奖励—爪 (野兽爪祷告) 并野兽眼关键道具。

steps.description: Offer Deathroot #2: reward — Bestial Sling (incantation) + 1x Ancient Dragon Smithing Stone (if offered enough)
steps.description_cn: 提交第三个死亡根：奖励野兽活力祷告。

steps.description: Offer Deathroot #3: reward — Beastial Constitution + Beast Claw 2
steps.description_cn: 提交第二/第四/第五至第九个死亡根：继续获得奖励。

steps.description: Offer Deathroot #4: reward — Gurranq becomes aggressive. Fight him until he calms down (reduce HP to ~50%). He returns to his spot.
steps.note: Do NOT kill him. He will surrender.
steps.description_cn: 提交第4个死亡根：古兰格变得具有攻击性。与他战斗直到他冷静下来（造成约50%血量伤害），然后对话至重复。
steps.note_cn: 不要杀死他，他会投降。

steps.description: After calming him, offer Deathroot #5: reward — Stone of Gurranq (incantation).
steps.description_cn: 在法姆·亚兹拉，提交第5个死亡根：获得古兰格的岩石祷告（石块）。

steps.description: Offer Deathroot #6: reward — Beast Claw 3 + Ancient Dragon Smithing Stone.
steps.description_cn: 提交死根 #6: 奖励—野兽爪 3 + 古龙岩锻造石。

steps.description: Offer Deathroot #7+: no further rewards beyond what you already collected (Ancient Dragon Smithing Stone at milestone).
steps.note: There are 9 Deathroot total in the game.
steps.description_cn: 提交死根 #7+: 没有进一步奖励之外什么你已经收集 (古龙岩锻造石在里程碑)。
steps.note_cn: 是 9 死根总数在。

steps.description: After defeating Maliketh in Farum Azula, Gurranq disappears from the Bestial Sanctum.
steps.note: Gurranq is revealed to be Maliketh.
steps.description_cn: 在逐渐崩毁的法姆·亚兹拉击败野兽祭司，古兰格最终消失于野兽神殿。
steps.note_cn: 古兰格是揭示玛利喀斯。

rewards: Ancient Dragon Smithing Stone (×2 at milestones)
failureConditions: Killing Gurranq during the aggressive phase
Failing to offer all Deathroot before defeating Maliketh
failureConditions_cn: 在古兰格暴怒阶段杀死他。
在击败玛利喀斯之前未提交所有死根。

roderika.name: Roderika
roderika.description: A young woman who lost her companions. Help her find her calling as a Spirit Tuner at Roundtable Hold.
roderika.description_cn: 一位失去同伴的年轻女子。帮助她在圆桌厅堂找到作为调灵师的使命。

steps.description: Find Roderika in Stormveil Castle, in the dark room past the Rampart Tower grace (the room with many dead bodies).
steps.note: She is huddled in the corner.
steps.description_cn: 在史东薇尔城，从断崖赐福旁边的房间（有许多活着尸体的房间）找到罗德莉卡。
steps.note_cn: 他蜷缩在角落。

steps.description: Exhaust her dialogue. She gives you the "Golden Seed" and a keepsake. Tell her to go to Roundtable Hold.
steps.description_cn: 对话至重复. 她会给你 "黄金种子" 并纪念品. 告诉她的去圆桌厅堂。

steps.description: Return to Roundtable Hold. Find Roderika near the blacksmith Hewg. Speak to her.
steps.description_cn: 回到圆桌厅堂，在铁匠修古处找到罗德莉卡。与她对话。

steps.description: Speak to Smithing Master Hewg about Roderika. He asks you to deliver a message to her.
steps.description_cn: 与铁匠修古谈论罗德莉卡。他请你帮忙传话给她。

steps.description: Deliver Hewg's message to Roderika. Reload the area.
steps.description_cn: 将修古的口信告诉罗德莉卡。重新加载区域。

steps.description: Speak to Roderika again. She agrees to become a Spirit Tuner. She moves to the room opposite Hewg.
steps.description_cn: 再次与罗德莉卡对话。她同意成为调灵师，搬到铁匠修古旁边。

steps.description: After the Roundtable Hold gets darker (post-Morgott), Roderika can upgrade your Spirit Ashes to +10. Exhaust all dialogue.
steps.note: She needs Glovewort to upgrade.
steps.description_cn: 圆桌厅堂变暗后（击败蒙葛特之后），罗德莉卡可以将你的骨灰强化至+10。对话至重复。
steps.note_cn: 她需要灵依铃兰强化。

steps.description: Find the "Roderika's Spirit Set" in Stormveil Castle if you missed it earlier, or she gives it to you eventually.
steps.description_cn: 如果之前在史东薇尔城错过了「罗德莉卡的灵魂套装」，可以回去找，或者她最终也会给你。

rewards: Spirit Tuning service (upgrade Spirit Ashes to +10)
failureConditions: Killing Roderika in Stormveil
Failing to talk to her before entering Leyndell (she still appears at Roundtable)
failureConditions_cn: 在史东薇尔城杀死罗德莉卡。
在进入王城之前未与她对话（她仍会圆桌出现）。

rya_tanith.name: Rya / Lady Tanith
rya_tanith.description: A young woman seeking her mother, and the mysterious lady of Volcano Manor. Accept Tanith's invitation to join the recusants.
rya_tanith.description_cn: 一位寻找母亲的年轻女子和火山官邸的神秘女主人。接受塔妮丝的邀请加入叛律者。

steps.description: Meet Rya in Liurnia, in the pavilion north of the Laskyar Ruins (near the lake shore). She asks for help retrieving her necklace.
steps.description_cn: 在利耶尼亚，拉斯卡废墟以北的凉亭遇见菈雅，她请你帮她取回被偷的项链。

steps.description: The necklace was stolen by Blackguard Big Boggart. Buy the necklace from Boggart for 1000 runes, or kill him.
steps.note: Boggart is boiling prawns near the lakeside.
steps.description_cn: 项链被流氓博格特偷走。从博格特处以1000卢恩购回，或直接杀死他。
steps.note_cn: 购买是最简单的办法，但如果你杀了他也能得到项链。

steps.description: Return the necklace to Rya. She rewards you and gives you a "Volcano Manor Invitation" item.
steps.description_cn: 将项链还给菈雅，她感谢你并给你「火山官邸的邀请函」。

steps.description: Travel to Mt. Gelmir. Enter Volcano Manor via the designated path (through the Ruin-Strewn Precipice or via the teleporter).
steps.note: Use the invitation to join officially.
steps.description_cn: 前往格密尔火山进入火山官邸经由指定路径 (穿过古遗迹断崖或经由传送点)。
steps.note_cn: 使用邀请加入正式。

steps.description: Speak to Lady Tanith in Volcano Manor. She welcomes you as a recusant. Exhaust her dialogue.
steps.description_cn: 对话塔妮丝夫人在火山官邸. 她欢迎你作为叛律者. 对话至重复。

steps.description: Speak to Rya in her room in Volcano Manor (first door on the right upstairs). Exhaust her dialogue.
steps.description_cn: 与菈雅在她的房间火山官邸 (第一门在右楼上). 对话至重复。
steps.note_cn: 她变成蛇形后仍然可以对话。

steps.description: Receive your first assassination letter from Tanith. Defeat Old Knight Istvan or the Great Horned Traggoth.
steps.note: The target depends on the letter you receive.
steps.description_cn: 获得你的第一暗杀信从塔妮丝. 击败旧骑士伊斯特万或大角特拉格斯。
steps.note_cn: 两个目标都可以在任何顺序完成。

steps.description: Return to Tanith. Speak to Rya again. She gives you a "Dancer's Castanets" as thanks.
steps.description_cn: 回到塔妮丝处，再次与菈雅对话，她给你「舞娘的打击乐器」作为感谢。

steps.description: Complete the second assassination (kill Rileigh the Idle or a similar mark).
steps.description_cn: 完成第二暗杀 (击杀里雷空闲或类似)。

steps.description: Tanith gives you the "Drawing-Room Key". Explore the hidden path behind the illusory wall in the drawing room.
steps.note: The wall is at the end of the drawing room, behind the paintings.
steps.description_cn: 塔妮丝给你「会客厅钥匙」，探索幻影墙后的秘密通道到隐藏房间。
steps.note_cn: 幻影墙在大厅壁炉后面。

steps.description: Reach the Temple of Eiglay. Defeat the Godskin Noble boss inside.
steps.description_cn: 到达艾格蕾教堂. 击败神皮贵族首领内部。

steps.description: Speak to Rya at the Temple of Eiglay. She reveals her true form (a snake hybrid). Accept her regardless.
steps.description_cn: 与菈雅在艾格蕾教堂. 她揭示她的真实形态 (蛇混合). 接受她的无论。
steps.note_cn: 接受她的真实身份不影响其他任务。

steps.description: Defeat Rykard, Lord of Blasphemy. Return to Volcano Manor.
steps.description_cn: 击败「亵渎君王」拉卡德，回到火山官邸。

steps.description: Speak to Tanith at Rykard's arena. She is eating his remains. Exhaust dialogue.
steps.note: She gives you her set if you exhaust all dialogue.
steps.description_cn: 与塔妮丝在拉卡德的竞技场. 他进食他的留. 重复对话至对话。
steps.note_cn: 再次加载后她仍在原地。

steps.description: If you killed Tanith, you can loot her set. If you let her be, she remains at the arena. Rya disappears or leaves the manor.
steps.note: Rya can be given the "Tonic of Forgetfulness" from a previous step.
steps.description_cn: 如果杀死塔妮丝，可以拾取她的套装。如果放过她，她会留在竞技场。菈雅消失离开火山官邸。
steps.note_cn: 菈雅可以给予过 "药水的遗忘" 从前一个步骤。

rewards: Access to Rykard boss fight area
Various incantations and items from the Manor
rewards_cn: 进入亵渎君王拉卡德Boss区域
官邸中的各种祷告和道具
failureConditions: Killing Rykard before joining Volcano Manor (locks the Manor quests)
Killing Tanith before completing the assassinations
Killing Rya early
failureConditions_cn: 在加入火山官邸之前杀死拉卡德（锁定所有官邸任务）。
在完成暗杀之前杀死塔妮丝。
提前杀死菈雅。

gostoc.name: Gatekeeper Gostoc
gostoc.description: A scheming gatekeeper at Stormveil Castle. He steals runes from you when you die inside the castle.
gostoc.description_cn: 史东薇尔城的一个狡猾门卫。你在城内死亡时他会偷走你的卢恩。

steps.description: Meet Gostoc at the main gate of Stormveil Castle. He offers to open the gate for you (for a price, or free if you intimidate him).
steps.note: If you refuse his offer, you can enter through the cliffside path.
steps.description_cn: 在史东薇尔城正门遇见葛托克，他提议帮你开门（有代价——他会偷你的卢恩）。
steps.note_cn: 他会在你每次在城内死亡时偷走30%的卢恩。

steps.description: Enter through the main gate. Gostoc follows you. If you die in the castle, he steals 30% of your dropped runes.
steps.note: You can kill Gostoc to stop this, but it ends his quest.
steps.description_cn: 从正门进入，葛托克跟着你。如果你在城内死亡，他会偷走你30%的卢恩。
steps.note_cn: 可以击杀葛托克这个但结局他的支线。

steps.description: After defeating Godrick, Gostoc appears near the Secluded Cell grace or in the throne room. Speak to him.
steps.description_cn: 击败接肢葛瑞克后，葛托克出现在偏僻牢房赐福附近或门卫处。与他对话。
steps.note_cn: 在你击杀葛瑞克后他才出现。

steps.description: Progress Nepheli/Kenneth/Gostoc throne room questline. After Nepheli becomes ruler, Gostoc becomes a merchant selling Ancient Dragon Smithing Stones.
steps.note: He sells up to 3 Ancient Dragon Smithing Stones.
steps.description_cn: 推进涅斐丽/肯尼斯/葛托克的王座室支线。涅斐丽成为统治者后，葛托克成为史东薇尔城的商人。
steps.note_cn: 触发此步之前需要先推进涅斐丽的王座室支线。

steps.description: If you kill Gostoc after he becomes a merchant, he drops the "Gostoc's Bell Bearing" and a unique item.
steps.note: Killing him early locks his shop.
steps.description_cn: 如果击杀葛托克在他成为商人他掉落 "葛托克的铃珠" 并独特道具。
steps.note_cn: 击杀他早期锁住他的。

rewards: Ancient Dragon Smithing Stones ×3 (bought from Gostoc after throne room ending)
rewards_cn: 古龙岩锻造石×3（从葛托克商店购买）
杀死后掉落的各种道具
failureConditions: Killing Gostoc early (locks his shop and Ancient Dragon Smithing Stones)
Failing to complete Nepheli questline
failureConditions_cn: 提前杀死葛托克（锁定商店和古龙岩锻造石）。
未完成涅斐丽支线。

ensha.name: Ensha of the Royal Remains
ensha.description: A silent knight serving Gideon Ofnir. He invades you in Roundtable Hold when you have acquired a certain medallion.
ensha.description_cn: 侍奉基甸·奥夫尼尔的沉默骑士。当你获得某个符节时，他会在圆桌厅堂入侵你。

steps.description: Speak to Ensha in Roundtable Hold (he stands guard near Gideon's office). He is silent.
steps.description_cn: 与恩夏在圆桌厅堂 (他站守卫附近基甸的办公室). 他沉默。

steps.description: Find the Haligtree Secret Medallion (Right) from Albus in Liurnia (Albus is disguised as a pot).
steps.description_cn: 寻找圣树秘密符节 (右) 从阿尔布斯在利耶尼亚 (阿尔布斯是伪装作为)。

steps.description: Return to Roundtable Hold. Rest at the grace. Ensha invades you near the fireplace.
steps.note: You MUST rest at the grace first, then walk around.
steps.description_cn: 在赐福休息. 恩夏入侵你附近壁炉。
steps.note_cn: 在赐福休息一下，然后搜索周围。

steps.description: Defeat invading Ensha. He drops the "Royal Remains Set".
steps.note: Gideon comments on Ensha's death.
steps.description_cn: 击败入侵恩夏. 他掉落 "王室留在套装"。
steps.note_cn: 基甸评论在恩夏的死亡。

failureConditions: Defeating Maliketh before acquiring the Haligtree Medallion (Right)
Killing Ensha in combat before his invasion (not possible unless you agro him)
failureConditions_cn: 在获得圣树秘密符节（右）之前击败玛利喀斯。
提前攻击恩夏。

d_beholder.name: D, Beholder of Death
d_beholder.description: The twin brother of D, Hunter of the Dead. He appears after his brother's death to claim his armor.
d_beholder.description_cn: 死亡猎人Ｄ的双胞胎兄弟。他在兄弟死后出现，取回他的铠甲。

steps.description: Progress D, Hunter of the Dead quest, reach Nokron (D dies automatically).
steps.note: D dies when you enter Nokron.
steps.description_cn: 在宁姆格福水路边的废墟下找到D，他请求你的帮助。
steps.note_cn: 死去当你进入诺克隆恩。

steps.description: Travel to the Roundtable Hold. D, Beholder of Death is now standing where D used to be.
steps.description_cn: 前往圆桌厅堂. 死亡窥视者Ｄ 是现在站位置使用过。

steps.description: Speak to D, Beholder of Death. He asks for the Twinned Set. Give it to him (or refuse).
steps.description_cn: 对话死亡窥视者Ｄ. 他请求双生套装. 交给他 (或拒绝)。

steps.description: If you give the Twinned Set, he rewards you and leaves. Find him later at the Tomb of the Giants area (or not, he departs the Lands Between).
steps.note: He wears the set and thanks you.
steps.description_cn: 如果你把双头剑套装还给D，他感谢你并离开。之后在死王子旁的墓碑处找到他（是的，在他离开之后）。
steps.note_cn: 他穿戴套装并感谢你。

steps.description: If you refuse, he stays hostile. You can kill him and loot the Twinned Set back.
steps.note: Alternate ending.
steps.description_cn: 如果你拒绝他，他不会采取敌对行动。可以杀死他并拾取双头剑套装。
steps.note_cn: 替代结局。

rewards_cn: 双胞胎套装（如果保留/拒绝）
failureConditions: Killing D, Beholder of Death before he asks for the armor
failureConditions_cn: 在死亡窥视者Ｄ索要铠甲之前杀死他。

seluvis.name: Preceptor Seluvis
seluvis.description: A scheming sorcerer and advisor to Ranni. He has his own secret agenda involving puppets and potions.
seluvis.description_cn: 一位阴险的魔法师，菈妮的顾问。他有着涉及傀儡和药水的秘密计划。

steps.description: Speak to Seluvis at Seluvis's Rise (near Ranni's Rise) after joining Ranni's service.
steps.description_cn: 与瑟廉在瑟廉魔法师塔 (附近菈妮魔法师塔) 加入菈妮的效劳。

steps.description: Seluvis offers to sell sorceries. He also asks you to deliver a potion to Nepheli Loux.
steps.description_cn: 塞尔维斯兜售魔法，他还请你将药水交给涅斐丽·露。

steps.description: Take Seluvis's Potion. You have a choice: give it to Nepheli (ends her quest), or give it to Gideon (he disposes of it).
steps.note: Giving to Gideon is safest and does not affect Nepheli.
steps.description_cn: 拿到塞尔维斯的药水，你有选择：给涅斐丽（结束她的支线），或给百智爵士（继续她的支线）。
steps.note_cn: 将药水交给百智爵士或基甸会保留选项。

steps.description: Return to Seluvis. He offers you a "Seluvis's Introduction" to learn about the Dung Eater puppet.
steps.description_cn: 回到塞尔维斯处，他提供「塞尔维斯的介绍」以了解食粪者傀儡。
steps.note_cn: 交出药水后才能获得介绍信。

steps.description: Find the secret puppet room behind the bookshelf in Seluvis's Rise (hit the bookshelf to reveal).
steps.note: The room contains puppets, including a doll of Ranni.
steps.description_cn: 寻找秘密傀儡房间后面书架在瑟廉魔法师塔 (书架揭示)。
steps.note_cn: 食粪者在王城下水道，他的傀儡召唤需要五个咒死温床。

steps.description: Seluvis eventually dies (when Ranni departs or after the Fingerslayer Blade is delivered). Loot his set and Bell Bearing.
steps.note: His body is found at Seluvis's Rise after Ranni leaves.
steps.description_cn: 塞尔维斯最终会死去（菈妮离开或交还猎杀指头刀后），从他的尸体上拾取装备和铃珠。
steps.note_cn: 他的尸体是找到在瑟廉魔法师塔菈妮离开。

rewards: Access to puppet summoning (Dung Eater puppet, etc.)
rewards_cn: 傀儡召唤的权限（食粪者傀儡等）
failureConditions: Killing Seluvis before getting the potion
Giving the potion to Nepheli (locks her questline)
Progressing Ranni's quest past the Fingerslayer Blade before doing all Seluvis steps
failureConditions_cn: 在获得药水之前杀死瑟廉。
将药水交给涅斐丽（锁定她的支线）。
在完成瑟廉所有步骤之前将猎杀指头刀交给菈妮。

shabriri.name: Shabriri
shabriri.description: The embodiment of the Frenzied Flame. He possesses Yura's body and guides the Tarnished toward the path of chaos.
shabriri.description_cn: 癫火的化身。他寄宿在尤拉的尸体中，引导褪色者走向混沌之路。

steps.description: Find Shabriri at the Second Church of Marika in Altus Plateau (after Yura disappears).
steps.note: He has possessed Yura's body.
steps.description_cn: 在亚坛高原 (尤拉消失)找到夏玻利利在玛丽卡第二教堂。
steps.note_cn: 他有附身尤拉的尸体。

steps.description: Exhaust his dialogue. He tells you about the Frenzied Flame and the path beneath Leyndell.
steps.description_cn: 对话至重复，他告诉你关于癫火和罗德尔下方的道路。

steps.description: Proceed to the Subterranean Shunning-Grounds under Leyndell. Reach the Cathedral of the Forsaken.
steps.description_cn: 前往罗德尔下方的弃置恶兆的地底，到达癫火封印。

steps.description: Remove all armor and open the door to the Three Fingers. Inherit the Frenzied Flame.
steps.note: This locks you into the Frenzied Flame ending.
steps.description_cn: 脱掉所有装备，打开癫火封印的门，继承癫火。
steps.note_cn: 这个锁住你在癫火火焰结局。

steps.description: Speak to Shabriri again (he may be at the Church of Repose in Mountaintops).
steps.description_cn: 与夏玻利利再次 (他可能在教堂的安息山顶进入)。

steps.description: Shabriri offers you the "Howl of Shabriri" incantation and guidance.
steps.description_cn: 夏玻利利提交你 "咆哮的夏玻利利" 祷告并指引。

rewards: Guidance to the Frenzied Flame ending
failureConditions: Killing Shabriri without exhausting dialogue
Defeating the Fire Giant before inheriting the Frenzied Flame (locks the door)
failureConditions_cn: 未对话至重复就杀死夏玻利利。
继承癫火之前击败火焰巨人。

gowry.name: Gowry
gowry.description: A merchant in Caelid who cares for Millicent. His true nature is tied to the Scarlet Rot and the pests of Caelid.
gowry.description_cn: 盖利德的一位商人，照顾着米莉森。他的真实本性与猩红腐败和盖利德的虫群有关。

steps.description: Meet Gowry in his shack in Caelid (south of Smoldering Wall grace). He asks you to find the Unalloyed Gold Needle.
steps.description_cn: 在盖利德即将熄灭的城墙赐福南边的小屋遇见盖里，他请你寻找纯金针。

steps.description: Retrieve the Unalloyed Gold Needle from the Church of Plague. Return to Gowry.
steps.note: He offers to repair it.
steps.description_cn: 从病村教堂取回纯金针，回到盖里处。
steps.note_cn: 他提交修复。

steps.description: Find the Sellia Hideaway behind the bookshelf. Defeat the Nox Swordstress duo.
steps.description_cn: 寻找瑟利亚藏身处后面书架. 击败诺克斯剑士双人。

steps.description: Return to Gowry for the repaired needle. Give it to Millicent.
steps.description_cn: 回到盖里处获取修复好的金针，交给米莉森。

steps.description: Gowry gives you incantations and continues to check on Millicent's progress.
steps.note: He sells various pest incantations.
steps.description_cn: 盖里会感谢你并揭示米莉森的真实身份。
steps.note_cn: 他出售各个祷告。

steps.description: If you help Millicent defeat her sisters, Gowry dies. Loot his Bell Bearing.
steps.description_cn: 如果帮助米莉森击败她的姐妹,高瑞死去。拾取他的铃珠。

failureConditions: Killing Gowry before retrieving the Unalloyed Gold Needle
Giving the needle to Millicent before repairing it
failureConditions_cn: 在取回纯净金针之前杀死高瑞。
在修复之前将针交给米莉森。

leda.name: Needle Knight Leda
leda.description: The leader of Miquella's followers. Help her reach Miquella's promised land and decide the fate of her companions.
leda.description_cn: 米凯拉追随者的领袖。帮助她到达米凯拉承诺的土地，决定她同伴的命运。

steps.description: Speak to Leda at the Cocoon of the Empyrean (Mohgwyn Palace) before entering the Land of Shadow.
steps.note: Touch Miquella's hand to enter the DLC.
steps.description_cn: 与蕾妲在神人坠眠之茧 (蒙格温王朝) 之前进入幽影之地。
steps.note_cn: 触碰米凯拉的进入 DLC。

steps.description: Find Leda at the Highroad Cross grace in Scadu Altus (north of Castle Ensis). Exhaust her dialogue.
steps.note: She is the main quest NPC guiding you through the DLC.
steps.description_cn: 在幽影亚坛的高路十字赐福（恩希斯城以北）找到蕾妲。对话至重复。
steps.note_cn: 他主要支线 NPC 引导你穿过 DLC。

steps.description: Progress through Castle Ensis. Leda's summon sign appears before the final boss of Castle Ensis (Rellana, Twin Moon Knight).
steps.note: Summoning her is optional but progresses her quest.
steps.description_cn: 推进恩希斯城，蕾妲的召唤标记出现在最终首领战之前（恩希斯城，双月骑士）。
steps.note_cn: 召唤她的是可选但推进她的支线。

steps.description: Meet Leda at the "Highroad Cross" again after Castle Ensis. She talks about the other followers: Hornsent and Freyja.
steps.description_cn: 恩希斯城后在「高路十字」再次遇见蕾妲，她谈论追猎者：角人和他的同伴。

steps.description: Meet Leda at various "Cross" sites throughout the DLC. Exhaust dialogue at each encounter.
steps.note: Key locations: Three-Path Cross, Main Gate Cross, Highroad Cross.
steps.description_cn: 在DLC各处的「十字」地点遇见蕾妲，每次对话至重复。
steps.note_cn: 每次对话内容不同，随DLC进度而变化。

steps.description: After progressing past the Shadow Keep (burning the sealing tree), Leda gathers other followers at Enir-Ilim.
steps.note: This is the point of no return for many DLC quests.
steps.description_cn: 推进到幽影城（燃烧封印树）后，蕾妲召集追随者到安尼尔·伊利姆。
steps.note_cn: 这是点的没有返回多 DLC 支线。

steps.description: At Enir-Ilim, choose to side with Leda or oppose her. Summon signs appear near the boss gate.
steps.note: This determines who fights with/against you in the final area.
steps.description_cn: 在安尼尔·伊利姆，选择站在蕾妲一边或反对她。召唤标记出现供选择。
steps.note_cn: 这个决定对抗与/ 你在最终区域。

steps.description: Defeat Leda and her allies if you oppose her, or help her defeat the hostile NPCs. The final battle involves multiple NPCs.
steps.note: Rewards include her armor set and items from each defeated follower.
steps.description_cn: 如果与蕾妲对立，击败她和她的盟友；如果帮助她，抵御敌对NPC。该战斗涉及多个NPC。
steps.note_cn: 在安尼尔·伊利姆的最终战。

failureConditions: Entering Enir-Ilim (burning sealing tree) before completing Leda-related follower dialogues
failureConditions_cn: 在完成蕾妲相关追随者对话之前点燃封印树进入艾尼尔伊利姆。

hornsent.name: Hornsent
hornsent.description: A Hornsent warrior filled with vengeance against the Erdtree civilization. His path crosses with Leda's.
hornsent.description_cn: 一个充满对黄金树文明复仇之心的角人战士。他的道路与蕾妲交织。

steps.description: Meet Hornsent at the Three-Path Cross grace in Gravesite Plain. Exhaust his dialogue.
steps.note: He is sitting near the cross.
steps.description_cn: 在墓地平原的三路十字赐福遇见角人。对话至重复。
steps.note_cn: 他坐附近十字标记。

steps.description: Progress through Belurat, Tower Settlement. Hornsent's summon sign appears before the boss (Divine Beast Dancing Lion).
steps.note: Summon him for the boss fight.
steps.description_cn: 进度穿过塔之镇贝瑞特. 角人的召唤标记出现在之前首领 (神圣野兽舞狮子)。
steps.note_cn: 他的召唤标记在地上，金色。

steps.description: Speak to Hornsent at the "Three-Path Cross" after Belurat. He talks about his vendetta.
steps.description_cn: 在贝鲁特后在「三路十字」与角人对话，他谈及他的复仇。
steps.note_cn: 他站在贝鲁特的某个房间里。

steps.description: Meet Hornsent at various locations throughout the DLC. He is often near crosses.
steps.note: He moves as you progress.
steps.description_cn: 在DLC各处可以遇见角人，他经常出现在十字标识附近。
steps.note_cn: 他移动到作为你进度。

steps.description: After the Shadow Keep, Hornsent's fate is tied to Leda. At Enir-Ilim, choose to help Hornsent or Leda.
steps.note: There are separate summon signs.
steps.description_cn: 完成幽影城后，角人的命运与蕾妲相连。在安尼尔·伊利姆，选择支持角人或蕾妲。
steps.note_cn: 是独立召唤标记。

steps.description: If you side with Hornsent, fight Leda and her loyal followers. If you side with Leda, fight Hornsent.
steps.note: Each choice yields different rewards.
steps.description_cn: 如果站在角人一方，对抗蕾妲和她的忠实追随者。如果站在蕾妲一方，对抗角人。
steps.note_cn: 双方都有多名NPC参战。

steps.description: Complete the final confrontation. Hornsent rewards you with his armor and weapon if he survives.
steps.description_cn: 完成最终对峙。如果角人存活，他会奖励你他的套装和武器。

rewards_cn: 不同选择对应的不同道具
failureConditions: Killing Hornsent at any point before the Enir-Ilim confrontation
Entering Enir-Ilim before exhausting his dialogue at the crosses
failureConditions_cn: 在艾尼尔伊利姆最终对决之前杀死角人。
在推进至艾尼尔伊利姆之前未完成他的十字标记对话。

freyja.name: Redmane Freyja
freyja.description: A loyal knight who served General Radahn. She follows Miquella hoping to find a new purpose.
freyja.description_cn: 一位效忠拉塔恩将军的忠诚骑士。她追随米凯拉，希望找到新的目标。

steps.description: Meet Freyja at the Three-Path Cross grace in Gravesite Plain. Exhaust her dialogue.
steps.note: She is near the cross, opposite Hornsent.
steps.description_cn: 在墓地平原的三路十字赐福遇见弗蕾亚。对话至重复。
steps.note_cn: 在三路十字处，不会错过。

steps.description: Speak to Freyja at various cross sites. She talks about Radahn and her past.
steps.description_cn: 在各个十字标识地点与弗蕾亚对话，她谈论拉塔恩和她的过去。

steps.description: Find the "Letter to Freyja" from Ansbach (from his quest). Deliver it to Freyja.
steps.note: This is a pivotal moment that affects the final confrontation.
steps.description_cn: 从安帕赫处找到「写给弗蕾亚的信」（从他的支线获取），转交给弗蕾亚。
steps.note_cn: 这是关键时刻那个影响最终对峙。

steps.description: After delivering the letter, Freyja reconsiders her allegiance. She may side with or against Leda at Enir-Ilim.
steps.note: If you don't deliver the letter, she automatically sides with Leda.
steps.description_cn: 交信后，弗蕾亚重新考虑她的效忠。她可能站在你这边，也可能站在蕾妲一方。
steps.note_cn: 交信后，她可以站在你这边对抗蕾妲。

steps.description: At Enir-Ilim, Freyja joins one side of the conflict. Defeat or spare her.
steps.note: Her armor set can be looted if she falls.
steps.description_cn: 在安尼尔·伊利姆，弗蕾亚加入冲突的一方。击败她或饶恕她。
steps.note_cn: 她的套装套装可以拾取如果她坠落。

failureConditions: Killing Freyja early
Entering Enir-Ilim before delivering the letter from Ansbach (if you want the alternate outcome)
failureConditions_cn: 提前杀死弗蕾亚。
在交付安帕赫的信之前进入艾尼尔伊利姆。

ansbach.name: Sir Ansbach
ansbach.description: A veteran warrior who once served Mohg, Lord of Blood. He now follows Miquella seeking redemption.
ansbach.description_cn: 一位曾侍奉鲜血君王蒙格的老兵。如今他追随米凯拉寻求救赎。
