steps.description: Meet Ansbach at the Main Gate Cross grace (outside Belurat Tower Settlement). Exhaust his dialogue.
steps.note: He is standing near the cross.
steps.description_cn: 遇见安帕赫在正门十字标记赐福 (外部贝瑞特塔聚落). 对话至重复。
steps.note_cn: 他站附近十字标记。

steps.description: Speak to Ansbach about his past. He gives you information about Mohg and Miquella.
steps.description_cn: 与安帕赫关于他的过去. 他会给你情报关于蒙格并米凯拉。

steps.description: Find the "Secret Rite Scroll" in the Shadow Keep (library area). Give it to Ansbach.
steps.note: The scroll is in the Shadow Keep's storeroom.
steps.description_cn: 寻找 "秘密仪式卷轴" 在幽影城 (图书馆区域). 交给安帕赫。
steps.note_cn: 卷轴是在幽影城的储藏室。

steps.description: Ansbach studies the scroll. He asks you to deliver a letter to Freyja (if you haven't already).
steps.description_cn: 在墓地平原搜索安帕赫的尸体，找到写给弗蕾亚的信（如果还没找到）。

steps.description: Deliver the letter to Freyja. Return to Ansbach.
steps.note: This affects the Enir-Ilim outcome.
steps.description_cn: 交付信弗蕾亚. 返回安帕赫。
steps.note_cn: 这个影响艾尼尔伊利姆结果。

steps.description: Progress to Enir-Ilim. Ansbach's summon sign appears if you completed his quest. He fights alongside you against Leda's forces.
steps.note: If not progressed, his sign is replaced by Bloody Knight Nataan's.
steps.description_cn: 在安尼尔·伊利姆，安帕赫的召唤标记出现，取决于你之前的支线选择。与他对话，选择站在他这边还是蕾妲一方。
steps.note_cn: 如果推进过快，他的剧情会被跳过，到达鲜血王子区域后。

steps.description: If Ansbach survives the Enir-Ilim conflict, you can find him later and receive his final rewards.
steps.description_cn: 完成安尼尔·伊利姆的冲突后，找到安帕赫的尸体并获取他的最终奖励。

failureConditions: Killing Ansbach before completing his quest
Entering Enir-Ilim before giving him the Secret Rite Scroll
failureConditions_cn: 在完成支线之前杀死安帕赫。
在交付秘密仪式卷轴之前进入艾尼尔伊利姆。

moore.name: Moore
moore.description: A merchant and provisioner for Miquella's followers. His fate is tied to the Forager Brood and the choices you make.
moore.description_cn: 米凯拉追随者的商人和补给官。他的命运与采集者族群和你的选择息息相关。

steps.description: Meet Moore at the Main Gate Cross grace (outside Belurat). He sells various wares.
steps.note: Buy items to progress his dialogue.
steps.description_cn: 在正门十字赐福（贝鲁特城外）遇见穆尔，他出售各种物品。
steps.note_cn: 购买道具进度他的对话。

steps.description: Exhaust his dialogue. He talks about the Forager Brood and his role in the group.
steps.description_cn: 对话至重复，他谈论采集者族群和他的角色。

steps.description: Travel to the Abyssal Woods or the Cerulean Coast. Find the Forager Brood NPCs interacting with Moore's items.
steps.description_cn: 前往深蓝森林或蓝海岸，找到采集者族群的NPC和穆尔的物品。

steps.description: Return to Moore periodically. His dialogue changes based on DLC progression.
steps.description_cn: 定期回到穆尔处，他的对话随DLC进度而变化。
steps.note_cn: 他会在不同进度时出售新商品。

steps.description: After the burning of the sealing tree, Moore is conflicted about his loyalty. Speak to him at Enir-Ilim.
steps.note: He asks you a question about his purpose.
steps.description_cn: 封印树燃烧后，穆尔在忠诚问题上感到矛盾。与他对话帮助他做出抉择。
steps.note_cn: 让他感到悲伤或离开取决于你的选择。

steps.description: Your answer determines his fate. If you say he should feel sad/conflicted, he eventually dies. If you say "I don't know" and keep him going, he survives.
steps.note: If he dies, you can loot his bell bearing and armor.
steps.description_cn: 你的回答决定他的命运。如果你说他应该感到伤心/矛盾，他会离开。如果你说无所谓，他会留下。
steps.note_cn: 如果他离开，可以拾取他的铃珠和装备。

failureConditions: Killing Moore early (locks his shop and quest)
Choosing the wrong dialogue option at Enir-Ilim (Moore dies but you still get his items)
failureConditions_cn: 提前杀死穆尔（锁定商店和支线）。
在艾尼尔伊利姆选择错误对话选项（穆尔会死，但仍可获取他的道具）。

thiollier.name: Thiollier
thiollier.description: A poison merchant obsessed with St. Trina. His quest intertwines with the sleeping goddess and the deepest secrets of the DLC.
thiollier.description_cn: 一位痴迷圣托莉娜的毒药商人。他的支线与沉睡女神和幽影地的最深秘密交织在一起。

steps.description: Meet Thiollier at the Pillar Path Cross grace in Gravesite Plain (northeastern border).
steps.note: He sells poison-related items.
steps.description_cn: 遇见休里耶在柱路十字标记赐福墓地平原 (东北边界)。
steps.note_cn: 他出售毒-相关道具。

steps.description: Exhaust his dialogue about St. Trina. He talks about the Goddess of Sleep.
steps.description_cn: 对话至重复关于圣托莉娜. 他对话关于女神的睡眠。

steps.description: Find the entrance to the Stone Coffin Fissure (accessed from the Cerulean Coast). Navigate down to the Garden of Deep Purple.
steps.note: The fissure is long and has several tough enemies.
steps.description_cn: 寻找入口石棺裂谷 (进入从青蓝海岸). 穿过向下深紫花园。
steps.note_cn: 裂隙是长并有几个困难敌人。

steps.description: Find St. Trina in the Garden of Deep Purple. Speak to her while she sleeps.
steps.note: She is at the bottom of the fissure.
steps.description_cn: 在深紫花园找到圣托莉娜，在她睡眠时与她对话。
steps.note_cn: 他在底部的裂隙。

steps.description: Return to Thiollier and tell him about St. Trina. He gives you a special item and asks you to go back.
steps.description_cn: 返回休里耶并告诉他关于圣托莉娜. 他会给你特殊道具并请求你去返回。
steps.note_cn: 该物品与「睡眠」主题相关。

steps.description: Return to St. Trina. Exhaust all dialogue to learn about Miquella's past. Receive the "Sleeping Goddess" related items.
steps.description_cn: 返回圣托莉娜. 对话至重复了解关于米凯拉的过去. 获得 "睡眠女神" 相关道具。

steps.description: After the sealing tree is burned, Thiollier moves to Enir-Ilim. His summon sign appears for the final battle.
steps.note: He fights on your side.
steps.description_cn: 封印树燃烧后，蒂奥里耶移动到安尼尔·伊利姆，他的召唤标记出现在最终战斗前。
steps.note_cn: 他对抗在你的站队。

steps.description: Speak to Thiollier after the final battle. He reveals what he learned and gives you final rewards.
steps.description_cn: 在最终战后与蒂奥里耶对话，他会告诉你他所了解的一切，并给你最终奖励。

failureConditions: Killing Thiollier before finding St. Trina
Entering Enir-Ilim before completing the St. Trina conversation chain
Killing St. Trina (she cannot be killed, only interacted with)
failureConditions_cn: 在找到圣托莉娜之前杀死休里耶。
在完成圣托莉娜对话链之前进入艾尼尔伊利姆。
杀死圣托莉娜（无法杀死，只能互动）。

igon.name: Igon
igon.description: A vengeful dragon hunter consumed by his hatred for Bayle the Dread. Help him fulfill his lifelong vendetta.
igon.description_cn: 一个被对恐惧之龙贝勒的仇恨吞噬的复仇龙猎人。帮助他实现毕生的仇杀。

steps.description: Meet Igon at the Pillar Path Waypoint grace in Gravesite Plain. He is lying on the ground, wounded.
steps.note: Exhaust his dialogue about Bayle.
steps.description_cn: 在墓地平原的柱路路标赐福遇见伊贡，他躺在地上，受了伤。
steps.note_cn: 对话至重复关于贝勒。

steps.description: Travel to the Dragon Pit in Gravesite Plain. Navigate through it and defeat the boss (ancient dragon).
steps.note: The Dragon Pit is south of the grace.
steps.description_cn: 前往墓地平原的龙坑，穿过龙坑击败古龙（人形敌人）。
steps.note_cn: 龙坑是南的赐福。

steps.description: Exit the Dragon Pit to reach the Jagged Peak. Igon arrives on his own and can be spoken to.
steps.description_cn: 离开龙坑到达尖刺山，伊贡自行到达，可以对话。

steps.description: Progress through the Jagged Peak. Find Igon at two locations along the path, each time resting and speaking.
steps.description_cn: 推进尖刺山，在路径上的两个位置找到伊贡，每个位置有新的信息和对话。

steps.description: Before the Bayle boss arena, Igon's summon sign is available. Summon him to fight Bayle the Dread.
steps.note: Igon MUST be summoned to complete his quest.
steps.description_cn: 在狂龙贝勒的首领战场地前，有伊贡的召唤标记。召唤他一起对抗狂龙贝勒。
steps.note_cn: 埃贡必须召唤完成他的支线。

steps.description: Defeat Bayle with Igon. He plays a crucial role in the fight and shouts at Bayle during the battle.
steps.note: After the fight, speak to Igon one last time.
steps.description_cn: 与伊贡一起击败贝勒，他在战斗中扮演关键角色，会向贝勒叫喊。
steps.note_cn: 在对战中，给伊贡一些时间。

steps.description: Igon passes away after his revenge is fulfilled. Loot his armor set and weapon from his body near the arena.
steps.description_cn: 伊贡在复仇完成后去世，在他的尸体附近收集其铠甲套装和武器。

rewards_cn: 贝勒的祷告（从追忆获得）
failureConditions: Killing Igon or failing to speak to him before the Bayle boss fight
Fighting Bayle without summoning Igon
Killing Bayle before finding Igon at Jagged Peak
failureConditions_cn: 在贝勒首领战之前杀死埃贡或未与他对话。
未召唤埃贡就击败贝勒。
在找到尖刺山的埃贡之前击败贝勒。

dane.name: Dryleaf Dane
dane.description: A silent martial arts master who follows Miquella. His spartan lifestyle and combat prowess make him a formidable ally or enemy.
dane.description_cn: 一位追随米凯拉的沉默武术大师。他简朴的生活方式和战斗技巧使他成为令人畏惧的盟友或敌人。

steps.description: Find Dane at the Moorth Ruins in Scadu Altus. He is meditating and does not speak.
steps.note: He is in a clearing within the ruins.
steps.description_cn: 寻找丹恩在穆斯废墟幽影亚坛. 他冥想并不对话。
steps.note_cn: 他在清理内废墟。

steps.description: Use the "Dryleaf" gesture in front of him (found elsewhere in the DLC, or at the ruins).
steps.note: The gesture can be found from a corpse in the area.
steps.description_cn: 使用「落叶」动作与丹恩互动（在DLC中获取，位于某个区域）。
steps.note_cn: 动作可以找到从尸体在区域。

steps.description: After the gesture, Dane acknowledges you but remains silent. He gives you the "Dryleaf Arts" martial arts weapon.
steps.description_cn: 在战斗中，丹恩测试你但保持沉默。战胜他获得「落叶丹恩的铃珠」。

steps.description: Dane moves to other locations as you progress. He can be found near various crosses in Scadu Altus.
steps.description_cn: 丹恩移动到其他位置作为你进度. 他可以找到附近各个十字标记在幽影亚坛。

steps.description: At Enir-Ilim, Dane joins the final confrontation. He fights alongside Leda if you oppose her.
steps.note: He is a formidable opponent.
steps.description_cn: 在安尼尔·伊利姆，丹恩参与最终对峙。你可以与他对战或站在他一边。
steps.note_cn: 他强大对手。

steps.description: Defeat or spare Dane. His armor set can be collected from his body.
steps.description_cn: 击败或饶恕丹恩. 他的套装套装可以收集从他的尸体。

rewards_cn: 丹恩的足具（护符/特殊道具）
failureConditions: Killing Dane before using the Dryleaf gesture
Entering Enir-Ilim without finding the gesture first
failureConditions_cn: 在使用落叶动作之前杀死丹恩。
在找到动作之前进入艾尼尔伊利姆。

ymir.name: Count Ymir
ymir.description: The High Priest of the Cathedral of Manus Metyr. He studies the fingers and seeks to unlock the secrets of the Fingerslayer.
ymir.description_cn: 马努斯美缇尔大教堂的大祭司。他研究指头，寻求解开猎杀指头的秘密。

steps.description: Find Count Ymir at the Cathedral of Manus Metyr (southwest of Scadu Altus, past the Cerulean Coast).
steps.note: The Cathedral is at the end of a long path.
steps.description_cn: 在玛努斯·塞利斯的大教堂找到约弥（位于幽影亚塔恩，赐福附近）。
steps.note_cn: 大教堂是在结局的长路径。

steps.description: Exhaust Ymir's dialogue. He talks about the fingers and gives you the "Finger Ruins" key.
steps.description_cn: 与约弥对话至重复，他谈论手指并给你「指头遗迹」钥匙。

steps.description: Travel to the Finger Ruins (accessible from the Cathedral's back area). Find the Fingerslayer Ruins and interact with them.
steps.description_cn: 前往指头遗迹 (可到达从大教堂的返回区域). 寻找猎杀指头刀废墟并互动使用。

steps.description: Return to Ymir. Report what you saw. He gives you the "Beloved Stardust" talisman.
steps.description_cn: 回到约弥处报告你的见闻，他给你「挚爱星尘」护符。

steps.description: Speak to Swordhand of Night Jolan at the Cathedral (she leans against a wall inside). Exhaust her dialogue.
steps.note: Jolan only appears after speaking to Ymir first.
steps.description_cn: 对话黑夜骑士约兰在大教堂 (她倚靠墙内部). 对话至重复。
steps.note_cn: 约兰靠在墙边，全身暗色刺客装束。

steps.description: Travel to a second Finger Ruins (located elsewhere in the DLC). Interact again with the ruins.
steps.description_cn: 前往第二指头遗迹 (位于别处在 DLC). 互动再次使用废墟。
steps.note_cn: 第二个指头废墟在幽影亚坛某处。

steps.description: Return to Ymir. He reveals more about Metyr, the Mother of Fingers. He gives you a special incantation.
steps.description_cn: 回到约弥处，他揭示更多关于「母亲之手」梅瑟莫的信息，给你「母亲之手」祷告。

steps.description: Travel to the final Finger Ruins deep beneath the Cathedral. Defeat the boss (Metyr, Mother of Fingers).
steps.note: This is a challenging boss fight.
steps.description_cn: 前往大教堂深处最后的指头遗迹，击败首领（「母亲之手」梅瑟莫）。
steps.note_cn: 这是挑战首领对抗。

steps.description: Return to Ymir one last time. He has gone mad from the revelations. Fight and defeat him.
steps.note: He uses finger sorceries against you.
steps.description_cn: 最后一次回到约弥处，他在启示中陷入疯狂，战斗并击败他。
steps.note_cn: 他使用指头魔法你。

steps.description: After Ymir's death, speak to Jolan. She now has a new purpose. You can either fight her or take her as a spirit ash.
steps.note: Your choice determines the reward.
steps.description_cn: 约弥死后，与约兰对话。她有了新的目标。你可以与她战斗或让她化为灰烬。
steps.note_cn: 约兰可能会成为可召唤的帮手。

rewards: Jolan's Ashes (spirit ash) or Jolan's Set (armor)
rewards_cn: 约兰的骨灰 或 约兰的套装
failureConditions: Killing Ymir before completing the Finger Ruins explorations
Killing Jolan before completing Ymir's questline
Entering Enir-Ilim before finishing the Finger Ruins chain
failureConditions_cn: 在完成指头遗迹探索之前杀死尤弥尔。
在完成尤弥尔支线之前杀死约兰。
在完成指头遗迹链之前进入艾尼尔伊利姆。

queelign.name: Fire Knight Queelign
queelign.description: A Fire Knight of Messmer who questions his purpose. His quest involves the flame of ruin and the truth behind Messmer's fire.
queelign.description_cn: 一位质疑自己使命的梅瑟莫火焰骑士。他的支线涉及毁灭之火和梅瑟莫火焰背后的真相。

steps.description: Find Queelign at Belurat, Tower Settlement. He is standing in a room near the entrance.
steps.note: Exhaust his dialogue about Messmer.
steps.description_cn: 在塔之镇贝鲁特找到昆林，他站在入口附近的一个房间里。
steps.note_cn: 对话至重复关于梅瑟莫。

steps.description: Defeat the Divine Beast Dancing Lion in Belurat. Return to speak to Queelign.
steps.description_cn: 击败贝鲁特的「神兽舞狮」，回去与昆林对话。

steps.description: Find Queelign at the Shadow Keep (or elsewhere in Scadu Altus, depending on progression).
steps.description_cn: 在幽影亚塔恩（取决于选择）找到昆兰的铃珠（大教堂区域）。

steps.description: Queelign invades you at a specific location (or offers a summon sign). Defeat or help him face his inner conflict.
steps.note: The interaction depends on your choices.
steps.description_cn: 昆林在特定位置入侵你（或提供召唤标记），击败或饶恕他取决于你的选择。
steps.note_cn: 取决于你之前的选项，他的立场有所不同。

steps.description: If you help him see the truth, Queelign gives you his flame incantations and becomes a merchant.
steps.description_cn: 在最终对峙中，如果你之前帮助了他，昆兰加入你的阵营并成为盟友。
steps.note_cn: 如果他成为友方，会在最终战提供帮助。

steps.description: If you oppose him, he fights you as an invader. Killing him drops his bell bearing and armor.
steps.note: Alternate ending.
steps.description_cn: 如果你与他为敌，他以入侵者的身份战斗，杀死他获得铃珠和装备。
steps.note_cn: 替代结局。

failureConditions: Killing Queelign in Belurat before he has a chance to move
Missing him at the Shadow Keep encounter
failureConditions_cn: 在贝瑞特提前杀死昆兰。
在幽影城错过与他的相遇。

hornsent_grandam.name: Hornsent Grandam
hornsent_grandam.description: The elder of the Hornsent people. She resides in Belurat and shares the history of the Hornsent people and their persecution.
hornsent_grandam.description_cn: 角人族的长老。她居住在贝瑞特，分享角人的历史和他们遭受的迫害。

steps.description: Find Hornsent Grandam in the Storeroom of Belurat, Tower Settlement. She is behind a locked door.
steps.note: You need the Storeroom Key from the area.
steps.description_cn: 在储藏室的塔之镇贝瑞特找到角人老妪。他后面锁定门。
steps.note_cn: 需要储藏室钥匙从区域。

steps.description: Exhaust her dialogue about the history of the Hornsent and Marika's crusade against them.
steps.description_cn: 对话至重复关于历史的角人并玛丽卡远征他们。

steps.description: Progress through the DLC. Return to her periodically to hear new stories and lore.
steps.description_cn: 推进 DLC. 返回她的定期新故事并背景。

steps.description: After specific events (defeating major bosses like Messmer), return to hear her commentary.
steps.description_cn: 在某个关键事件（比如在保管库看到梅瑟莫之后）后，与角人老妪对话。

steps.description: Complete the DLC. She has no quest ending per se — she remains in the storeroom as a lore NPC.
steps.note: No rewards other than lore.
steps.description_cn: 完成 DLC. 他有没有支线结局—她留在储藏室作为背景 NPC。
steps.note_cn: 没有奖励其他背景。

rewards: Hornsent lore and history (no physical rewards)
Emotes and stories about Marika's past
rewards_cn: 角人的历史和故事（无实物奖励）
关于玛丽卡过去的表情和故事
failureConditions: Killing Hornsent Grandam
Failing to open the Storeroom door before progressing too far (door remains locked)
failureConditions_cn: 杀死角人老妪。
推进太远而未打开保管库的门。

dragon_priestess.name: Dragon Communion Priestess
dragon_priestess.description: A priestess who serves the Dragon Communion altar. Help her unlock the true power of the dragons.
dragon_priestess.description_cn: 一位侍奉龙飨祭坛的女祭司。帮助她解锁龙的真正力量。

steps.description: Find the Dragon Communion Priestess at the Grand Altar of Dragon Communion (south of the Dragon Pit exit).
steps.note: She is kneeling at the altar.
steps.description_cn: 在龙飨大祭坛（龙坑出口南边）找到龙飨女巫。
steps.note_cn: 她跪在祭坛前。

steps.description: Exhaust her dialogue. She tells you about the heart of the dragons and the great dragon communion.
steps.description_cn: 对话至重复，她告诉你关于龙心和伟大龙飨的事。

steps.description: Defeat the Dragon Bosses in the DLC. Bring Dragon Hearts to the Priestess.
steps.note: Key dragon bosses: Ancient Dragon, Bayle, etc.
steps.description_cn: 击败DLC中的龙首领，将龙心带给女巫。
steps.note_cn: 主要龙首领：古龙、贝勒等。

steps.description: Offer Dragon Hearts to her. She grants you stronger dragon incantations.
steps.description_cn: 向她献上龙心，她会授予你更强的龙祷告。

steps.description: After offering enough hearts, she reveals the secret of the Dragon Form. She can transform you into an aspect of the dragon.
steps.note: This is the Dragon Transformation.
steps.description_cn: 提交足够多的龙心后，她揭示龙形态的秘密。她可以将你转化为龙。
steps.note_cn: 这是龙转化。

steps.description: Complete the Dragon Transformation ritual. The Priestess completes her duty and may depart or remain.
steps.note: You receive the Dragon Form incantation.
steps.description_cn: 完成龙转化仪式，女巫完成使命后可能离开或留下。
steps.note_cn: 你获得龙形态祷告。

rewards: Dragon Communion Incantations (all DLC dragon spells)
rewards_cn: 龙飨祷告（所有DLC龙系魔法）
failureConditions: Killing the Dragon Communion Priestess
Failing to defeat enough Dragon Bosses before completing the DLC
failureConditions_cn: 杀死龙飨女巫。
在完成DLC之前未击败足够的龙首领。

st_trina.name: St. Trina
st_trina.description: Miquella's other half and the Goddess of Sleep. She was abandoned in the depths of the Stone Coffin Fissure. Speak to her in her slumber.
st_trina.description_cn: 米凯拉的另一半，睡梦之神。她被遗弃在石棺裂谷的深处。她沉睡时与她对话。

steps.description: Find the entrance to the Stone Coffin Fissure on the Cerulean Coast (western edge of the DLC map).
steps.note: The entrance is near a cliff.
steps.description_cn: 寻找入口石棺裂谷在青蓝海岸 (西部的 DLC 地图)。
steps.note_cn: 入口是附近悬崖。

steps.description: Navigate through the Stone Coffin Fissure. It is a long descent with many enemies.
steps.description_cn: 穿过穿过石棺裂谷. 是长下降与多敌人。

steps.description: Reach the Garden of Deep Purple at the bottom of the fissure. Find St. Trina sleeping in the garden.
steps.description_cn: 到达深紫花园在底部的裂隙. 花园找到圣托莉娜睡眠。
steps.note_cn: 圣托莉娜不会主动攻击，可以安全对话。

steps.description: Speak to St. Trina. She talks in her sleep about Miquella, her other half, and why she was abandoned.
steps.description_cn: 与圣托莉娜对话，她在睡梦中谈论米凯拉、她的另一半，以及她要放弃的东西。

steps.description: Leave and return after making progress in the DLC. Speak to her again for more dialogue.
steps.description_cn: 离开后再回来（推进DLC进度后），再次与她对话获得更多内容。

steps.description: Exhaust all her dialogue across multiple visits. She reveals crucial lore about Miquella's plan.
steps.note: She also gives you the "St. Trina's Smile" talisman or similar.
steps.description_cn: 重复对话至所有她的对话穿过多个探访. 她揭示关键背景关于米凯拉的。
steps.note_cn: 需要多次进出地图来刷新对话。

steps.description: After the DLC story is complete, return to St. Trina one last time. She may have a final message.
steps.note: Her fate is tied to Miquella's.
steps.description_cn: DLC故事完成后，最后一次回到圣托莉娜处，她可能有最终的信息。
steps.note_cn: 这是最后一个对话机会。

rewards_cn: 关于米凯拉的深层背景故事
failureConditions: Killing St. Trina (not possible)
Entering Enir-Ilim without visiting St. Trina at least once (locks deeper lore)
failureConditions_cn: 杀死圣托莉娜（不可能）。
在进入艾尼尔伊利姆之前未访问圣托莉娜至少一次。
